`; } else { const price = bp.premiumPrice || 0; const coin = _data.monedaEvento.nombre || 'Moneda Evento'; buyWrap.innerHTML = ` `; } } this._ensureRewards(); const container = document.getElementById('ev-bp-levels-container'); if (!container) return; const freeClaimed = (ed.claimedRewards?.free || []); const premiumClaimed = (ed.claimedRewards?.premium || []); const buildTrackHTML = (reward, track, levelNum, unlocked) => { const claimed = (track === 'free' ? freeClaimed : premiumClaimed).includes(levelNum); const isPrem = track === 'premium'; const canClaim = unlocked && !claimed && (!isPrem || hasPre); const { icon, name, isImg } = this._resolveEventReward(reward); const iconHtml = isImg ? `` : `
${icon}
`; let action; if (claimed) { action = `
✅
`; } else if (!unlocked) { action = `
🔒
`; } else if (isPrem && !hasPre) { action = `
👑
`; } else { action = ``; } return `
${isPrem ? '👑' : '🎁'} ${iconHtml}
${name}
${reward.cantidad && !['item-evento','caja-evento','sobre-evento','caja-normal','sobre-normal','item-juego'].includes(reward.tipo) ? `
x${reward.cantidad}
` : ''}
${action}
`; }; let html = ''; for (let i = 0; i < 15; i++) { const levelNum = i + 1; const unlocked = lvl >= levelNum; const current = lvl === levelNum; const fr = bp.freeRewards[i] || { tipo:'moneda-evento', id:'', cantidad:100 }; const pr = bp.premiumRewards[i] || { tipo:'moneda-evento', id:'', cantidad:100 }; html += `
${levelNum}
${buildTrackHTML(fr, 'free', levelNum, unlocked)} ${buildTrackHTML(pr, 'premium', levelNum, unlocked)}
⭐${xpReq}
`; } container.innerHTML = html; // Event delegation único container.onclick = e => { const btn = e.target.closest('[data-ev-bp-claim]'); if (btn) this.claimEventBattlePassReward( parseInt(btn.dataset.evBpClaim, 10), btn.dataset.evBpTrack || 'free' ); }; }, // ── Comprar el Pase Premium del evento ── buyEventPremiumPass() { if (!currentUser) return; if (!currentUser.eventData) currentUser.eventData = { xp:0, battlePassLevel:1, hasPremium:false, claimedRewards:{free:[],premium:[]} }; const ed = currentUser.eventData; if (ed.hasPremium) { showToast('Ya tienes el Pase Premium de Evento', 'info'); return; } const price = _data.battlePass.premiumPrice || 0; const coins = currentUser.eventCoins || 0; if (coins < price) { showToast(`Necesitas ${price} ${_data.monedaEvento.nombre || 'moneda evento'} para comprar el Pase Premium`, 'error'); return; } currentUser.eventCoins -= price; ed.hasPremium = true; debouncedSave(); showToast('🎉 ¡Compraste el Pase Premium de Evento!', 'success'); this.renderBattlePassPlayer(); if (typeof updateUI === 'function') updateUI(); }, // ── Resolver icono/nombre de una recompensa de evento ── _resolveEventReward(reward) { if (!reward) return { icon:'💎', name:'Recompensa', isImg:false }; switch (reward.tipo) { case 'item-evento': { const it = _itemsMap.get(String(reward.id)); return it ? { icon: it.imagen || 'https://via.placeholder.com/38', name: it.nombre, isImg: true } : { icon: 'https://via.placeholder.com/38?text=?', name: 'Item Evento', isImg: true }; } case 'item-juego': { const itJ = (typeof allItems !== 'undefined') ? allItems.find(i => String(i.id) === String(reward.id)) : null; return itJ ? { icon: itJ.image || 'https://via.placeholder.com/38', name: itJ.name, isImg: true } : { icon: 'https://via.placeholder.com/38?text=?', name: 'Ítem del Juego', isImg: true }; } case 'caja-evento': return { icon:'🎁', name: `Caja Evento: ${reward.id||'?'}`, isImg:false }; case 'sobre-evento': return { icon:'📦', name: `Sobre Evento: ${reward.id||'?'}`, isImg:false }; case 'caja-normal': return { icon:'📦', name: `Caja: ${reward.id||'?'}`, isImg:false }; case 'sobre-normal': return { icon:'📬', name: `Sobre: ${reward.id||'?'}`, isImg:false }; case 'moneda-evento': return { icon:'🪙', name: _data.monedaEvento.nombre || 'Moneda Evento', isImg:false }; case 'oro': return { icon:'💰', name: 'Oro', isImg:false }; case 'diamantes': return { icon:'💎', name: 'Diamantes', isImg:false }; case 'aliento-dragon': return { icon:'🐉', name: 'Aliento de Dragón', isImg:false }; case 'energia': return { icon:'⚡', name: 'Energía', isImg:false }; case 'jupiter': return { icon:'⭐', name: 'Estrellas Júpiter', isImg:false }; default: return { icon:'🎁', name: 'Recompensa', isImg:false }; } }, // ── Reclamar recompensa del pase de evento ── claimEventBattlePassReward(levelNum, track) { if (!currentUser) return; if (!currentUser.eventData) currentUser.eventData = { xp:0, battlePassLevel:1, hasPremium:false, claimedRewards:{free:[],premium:[]} }; const ed = currentUser.eventData; // Normalizar formato claimedRewards if (!ed.claimedRewards || typeof ed.claimedRewards !== 'object' || Array.isArray(ed.claimedRewards)) { ed.claimedRewards = { free: Array.isArray(ed.claimedRewards) ? ed.claimedRewards : [], premium: [] }; } if (!Array.isArray(ed.claimedRewards.free)) ed.claimedRewards.free = []; if (!Array.isArray(ed.claimedRewards.premium)) ed.claimedRewards.premium = []; const claimedArr = track === 'premium' ? ed.claimedRewards.premium : ed.claimedRewards.free; if (claimedArr.includes(levelNum)) { showToast('Ya reclamaste esta recompensa', 'info'); return; } if ((ed.battlePassLevel || 1) < levelNum) { showToast('Debes alcanzar este nivel primero', 'error'); return; } if (track === 'premium' && !ed.hasPremium) { showToast('Necesitas el Pase Premium de Evento', 'error'); return; } const bp = _data.battlePass; const reward = track === 'premium' ? bp.premiumRewards[levelNum-1] : bp.freeRewards[levelNum-1]; if (!reward) { showToast('No hay recompensa configurada', 'error'); return; } // Entregar recompensa (recursos de evento Y del juego) switch (reward.tipo) { case 'moneda-evento': currentUser.eventCoins = (currentUser.eventCoins || 0) + (reward.cantidad || 0); showToast(`🎉 +${reward.cantidad} ${_data.monedaEvento.nombre || 'Moneda Evento'}`, 'success'); break; case 'oro': currentUser.gold = (currentUser.gold || 0) + (reward.cantidad || 0); showToast(`💰 +${reward.cantidad} Oro`, 'success'); break; case 'diamantes': currentUser.diamonds = (currentUser.diamonds || 0) + (reward.cantidad || 0); showToast(`💎 +${reward.cantidad} Diamantes`, 'success'); break; case 'aliento-dragon': currentUser.dragonBreath = (currentUser.dragonBreath || 0) + (reward.cantidad || 0); showToast(`🐉 +${reward.cantidad} Aliento de Dragón`, 'success'); break; case 'energia': currentUser.energy = (currentUser.energy || 0) + (reward.cantidad || 0); showToast(`⚡ +${reward.cantidad} Energía`, 'success'); break; case 'jupiter': currentUser.jupiterStars = (currentUser.jupiterStars || 0) + (reward.cantidad || 0); showToast(`⭐ +${reward.cantidad} Estrellas Júpiter`, 'success'); break; case 'item-evento': { const it = _itemsMap.get(String(reward.id)); if (it) { if (!Array.isArray(currentUser.inventory)) currentUser.inventory = []; currentUser.inventory.push(_mkInventoryItem(it)); showToast(`🗡️ ¡"${it.nombre}" añadido a tu inventario!`, 'success'); } else { showToast('Item de evento no encontrado', 'error'); return; } break; } case 'item-juego': { const itJ = (typeof allItems !== 'undefined') ? allItems.find(i => String(i.id) === String(reward.id)) : null; if (itJ) { if (!Array.isArray(currentUser.inventory)) currentUser.inventory = []; currentUser.inventory.push(_mkInventoryItem(itJ)); showToast(`🔷 ¡"${itJ.name}" añadido a tu inventario!`, 'success'); } else { showToast('Ítem del juego no encontrado', 'error'); return; } break; } case 'caja-evento': case 'sobre-evento': showToast(`🎁 Recompensa de evento recibida (Nivel ${levelNum} · ${track === 'premium' ? 'Premium' : 'Gratis'})`, 'success'); break; case 'caja-normal': { if (typeof allBoxes !== 'undefined' && typeof abrirCajaDirecta === 'function') { const boxN = allBoxes.find(b => String(b.id) === String(reward.id)); if (boxN) { abrirCajaDirecta(boxN); } else { showToast('Caja del juego no encontrada', 'error'); return; } } break; } case 'sobre-normal': { if (typeof openPackById === 'function') { openPackById(String(reward.id), true); } break; } default: showToast(`🎁 Recompensa recibida`, 'success'); } claimedArr.push(levelNum); debouncedSave(); this.renderBattlePassPlayer(); if (typeof updateUI === 'function') updateUI(); }, // ── Ganar XP de evento (NO afecta XP normal) ── addEventBattlePassXP(amount) { if (!currentUser || amount <= 0) return; if (!currentUser.eventData) currentUser.eventData = { xp:0, battlePassLevel:1, hasPremium:false, claimedRewards:{free:[],premium:[]} }; if (!_data.battlePass.active) return; const ed = currentUser.eventData; const xpReq = _data.battlePass.xpRequiredPerLevel || 100; ed.xp += amount; let leveled = false; while (ed.battlePassLevel < 15 && ed.xp >= xpReq) { ed.xp -= xpReq; ed.battlePassLevel++; leveled = true; } if (ed.battlePassLevel >= 15) { ed.battlePassLevel = 15; ed.xp = Math.min(ed.xp, xpReq); } if (leveled) showToast(`🎖️ ¡Subiste al nivel ${ed.battlePassLevel} del Pase de Evento!`, 'success'); debouncedSave(); }, // ── Resetear pase para todos los jugadores ── resetBattlePassAllUsers() { if (!_isAdmin()) { showToast('Sin permisos de admin', 'error'); return; } if (!confirm('⚠️ Esto reiniciará el Pase de Evento de TODOS los jugadores (XP, nivel, premium y recompensas). ¿Continuar?')) return; const blank = function() { return { xp:0, battlePassLevel:1, hasPremium:false, claimedRewards:{free:[],premium:[]} }; }; // CORREGIDO: usar 'users' en lugar de 'allUsers' if (typeof users !== 'undefined' && Array.isArray(users)) { users.forEach(u => { u.eventData = blank(); }); if (currentUser) { const idx = users.findIndex(u => u.username === currentUser.username); if (idx !== -1) currentUser.eventData = users[idx].eventData; } debouncedSave(); showToast('✅ Pase de Evento reseteado para todos los jugadores', 'success'); if (typeof this.renderBattlePassPlayer === 'function') this.renderBattlePassPlayer(); } else { showToast('No se encontraron jugadores', 'error'); } }, /* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ }; })(); /* ── Funciones globales que llama el HTML del evento ── */ function evAdminTab(tab, btn) { document.querySelectorAll('.ev-admin-content').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active')); const el = document.getElementById('ev-tab-' + tab); if (el) el.classList.add('active'); document.querySelectorAll('.ev-admin-tab-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active')); if (btn) btn.classList.add('active'); else { // buscar por nombre del tab document.querySelectorAll('.ev-admin-tab-btn').forEach(b => { if (b.getAttribute('onclick') && b.getAttribute('onclick').includes(`'${tab}'`)) b.classList.add('active'); }); } if (tab === 'lista-items') EventoSystem.renderItemsList(); if (tab === 'pase-evento') EventoSystem.renderBattlePassAdmin(); if (tab === 'tienda-evento') { EventoSystem.renderAdminEventShopSlots(); EventoSystem.populateAdminSlotItemSelect(); } if (tab === 'ruleta') rouletteSystem.renderAdminTab(); } function evPreviewColor(prefix) { const input = document.getElementById(`ev-${prefix}-color`); const prev = document.getElementById(`ev-${prefix}-color-prev`); if (!input || !prev) return; const val = input.value.trim(); prev.style.background = val || (prefix === 'mon' ? 'linear-gradient(135deg,#ff00cc,#3333ff)' : 'linear-gradient(90deg,#00ff88,#00d4ff)'); } function evColorPreset(prefix, value) { const input = document.getElementById(`ev-${prefix}-color`); if (input) { input.value = value; evPreviewColor(prefix); } } function evPreviewHeader() { const n = document.getElementById('ev-section-title'); const d = document.getElementById('ev-section-desc'); const ni = document.getElementById('ev-cfg-nombre'); const di = document.getElementById('ev-cfg-desc'); if (n && ni) n.textContent = ni.value || 'Evento'; if (d && di) d.textContent = di.value || ''; } function evPreviewItemImg() { evUpdateImgPreview(document.getElementById('ev-item-img')?.value || ''); } function evUpdateImgPreview(url) { url = (url || '').trim(); const wrap = document.getElementById('ev-item-img-preview-wrap'); const prev = document.getElementById('ev-item-img-prev'); if (!prev) return; if (url) { prev.src = url; if (wrap) wrap.style.display = 'block'; } else { if (wrap) wrap.style.display = 'none'; } } function evSwitchImgTab(tab) { ['url','file','gallery'].forEach(t => { const panel = document.getElementById(`ev-img-panel-${t}`); const btn = document.getElementById(`ev-img-tab-${t}`); if (panel) panel.style.display = t === tab ? 'block' : 'none'; if (btn) { btn.style.background = t === tab ? 'var(--secondary)' : 'transparent'; btn.style.color = t === tab ? '#fff' : 'var(--secondary)'; } }); if (tab === 'gallery') evRenderItemGallery(); } function evHandleItemImageFile(input) { const file = input.files[0]; if (!file) return; const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = e => { const b64 = e.target.result; const imgEl = document.getElementById('ev-item-img'); if (imgEl) imgEl.value = b64; evUpdateImgPreview(b64); }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); } function evRenderItemGallery(filter) { const grid = document.getElementById('ev-item-gallery-grid'); if (!grid) return; const items = (EventoSystem.getData().itemsEvento || []) .filter(it => it.imagen && (!filter || it.nombre.toLowerCase().includes(filter.toLowerCase()))); if (!items.length) { grid.innerHTML = '

No hay ítems de evento con imagen aún.

'; return; } grid.innerHTML = items.map(it => `
` ).join(''); } function evPickGalleryImg(url, name) { const imgEl = document.getElementById('ev-item-img'); if (imgEl) imgEl.value = url; evUpdateImgPreview(url); const nombreEl = document.getElementById('ev-item-nombre'); if (nombreEl && !nombreEl.value.trim()) nombreEl.value = name; } function evFilterItemGallery(q) { evRenderItemGallery(q); } function evClearItemForm() { ['ev-item-editing-id','ev-item-nombre','ev-item-img','ev-item-material','ev-item-card-desc','ev-item-kingdom'].forEach(id => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.value = ''; }); // Limpiar y desbloquear campo ID const idField = document.getElementById('ev-item-id-field'); if (idField) { idField.value = ''; idField.readOnly = false; idField.style.opacity = '1'; idField.style.cursor = ''; idField.dataset.manualEdit = 'false'; } const idStatus = document.getElementById('ev-item-id-status'); if (idStatus) { idStatus.textContent = 'Nuevo'; idStatus.style.background = 'rgba(255,255,255,.08)'; idStatus.style.color = 'rgba(255,255,255,.4)'; } ['ev-item-dmg','ev-item-hp','ev-item-price-gold','ev-item-price-diamond','ev-item-price-dragon','ev-item-price-jupiter','ev-item-descuento','ev-item-nivel-req','ev-item-copas-req'].forEach(id => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.value = '0'; }); const precio = document.getElementById('ev-item-precio'); if (precio) precio.value = '100'; const actEl = document.getElementById('ev-item-activo'); if (actEl) actEl.value = 'true'; const tipoEl = document.getElementById('ev-item-tipo'); if (tipoEl) { tipoEl.value = 'casco'; evUpdateItemForm(); } const rar = document.getElementById('ev-item-rareza'); if (rar) rar.value = 'evento'; const dest = document.getElementById('ev-item-destacado'); if (dest) dest.checked = false; const rot = document.getElementById('ev-item-rotacion-diaria');if (rot) rot.checked = false; const of = document.getElementById('ev-item-oferta'); if (of) of.checked = false; const ofd = document.getElementById('ev-item-oferta-fields'); if (ofd) ofd.style.display = 'none'; const fileEl = document.getElementById('ev-item-img-file'); if (fileEl) fileEl.value = ''; evUpdateImgPreview(''); evSwitchImgTab('url'); } /** Auto-genera el ID desde el nombre del item (solo si es nuevo / no fue editado manualmente) */ function evItemIdAutoGen() { const idField = document.getElementById('ev-item-id-field'); // No sobreescribir si el admin está editando un item existente (readonly) if (!idField || idField.readOnly) return; // No sobreescribir si el admin ya tocó el campo manualmente if (idField.dataset.manualEdit === 'true') return; const nombre = (document.getElementById('ev-item-nombre')?.value || '').trim(); if (!nombre) return; // Convertir: minúsculas, tildes fuera, espacios → _, quitar caracteres inválidos const generated = nombre .toLowerCase() .normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '') // quitar tildes .replace(/\s+/g, '_') .replace(/[^a-z0-9_\-]/g, '') .replace(/_+/g, '_') .slice(0, 40); idField.value = generated || ''; } /** Marca el campo como editado manualmente para que auto-gen no lo sobreescriba */ function evItemIdManualEdit() { const idField = document.getElementById('ev-item-id-field'); if (idField) idField.dataset.manualEdit = idField.value ? 'true' : 'false'; } /** Muestra/oculta los campos condicionales del form de item de evento */ function evUpdateItemForm() { const tipo = document.getElementById('ev-item-tipo')?.value || 'casco'; const equipTypes = ['casco','gafas','pechera','pantalones','botas','arma']; const show = (id, visible) => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.style.display = visible ? 'block' : 'none'; }; show('ev-item-equip-fields', equipTypes.includes(tipo)); show('ev-item-mascota-fields', tipo === 'mascota'); show('ev-item-carta-fields', tipo === 'carta'); show('ev-item-corona-fields', tipo === 'corona'); } // ── Tienda Evento admin helpers ── function evShopSlotSave() { EventoSystem.adminSaveSlot(); } function evShopSlotClear() { EventoSystem.adminClearSlotForm(); EventoSystem.renderAdminEventShopSlots(); } function evShopSlotTipoChange() { const tipo = document.getElementById('ev-shop-slot-tipo')?.value; const itemWrap = document.getElementById('ev-shop-slot-item-wrap'); const manualWrap = document.getElementById('ev-shop-slot-manual-wrap'); const packWrap = document.getElementById('ev-shop-slot-pack-wrap'); if (itemWrap) itemWrap.style.display = (tipo === 'item') ? 'block' : 'none'; if (manualWrap) manualWrap.style.display = (tipo !== 'item') ? 'block' : 'none'; if (packWrap) packWrap.style.display = (tipo === 'pack') ? 'block' : 'none'; } // ── Ruleta admin helpers ── function rlAdminSaveConfig() { rouletteSystem.saveAdminConfig(); } function rlAdminSaveVideos() { rouletteSystem.saveAdminVideos(); } function rlAdminPreviewIdle() { rouletteSystem.previewAdminIdle(); } // ── Recompensas ruleta ── function rlRwSave() { rouletteSystem.saveReward(); } function rlRwClear() { rouletteSystem.clearRewardForm(); rouletteSystem._updateProbBadge(); } function rlRwTypeChange() { const type = document.getElementById('rl-rw-type')?.value; const itemWrap = document.getElementById('rl-rw-item-wrap'); const manWrap = document.getElementById('rl-rw-manual-wrap'); const qtyWrap = document.getElementById('rl-rw-qty-wrap'); const manLabel = document.getElementById('rl-rw-manual-label'); const qtyLabel = document.getElementById('rl-rw-qty-label'); const isItem = type === 'item'; const isGameItem = type === 'game-item'; const isCurrency = type === 'currency' || type === 'oro' || type === 'diamantes' || type === 'dragon' || type === 'jupiter'; const isXp = type === 'xp'; const isManual = !isItem && !isGameItem && !isCurrency && !isXp; // box, envelope, pass if (itemWrap) itemWrap.style.display = (isItem || isGameItem) ? 'block' : 'none'; // Actualizar label del select de items según si es evento o juego const itemLabel = document.getElementById('rl-rw-item-wrap')?.querySelector('label'); if (itemLabel) itemLabel.textContent = isGameItem ? 'Ítem del Juego' : 'Item de Evento'; // Repoblar el select según el tipo if (isGameItem) { rlPopulateGameItemSelect(); } else if (isItem) { rouletteSystem.populateRewardItemSelect(); } if (manWrap) manWrap.style.display = isManual ? 'block' : 'none'; if (qtyWrap) qtyWrap.style.display = (isCurrency || isXp) ? 'block' : 'none'; if (manLabel) { manLabel.textContent = type === 'box' ? 'ID de la Caja' : type === 'envelope' ? 'ID del Sobre' : type === 'pass' ? 'ID del Pase' : 'ID / Nombre'; } if (qtyLabel) { qtyLabel.textContent = type === 'currency' ? 'Cantidad de Moneda Evento' : type === 'oro' ? 'Cantidad de Oro' : type === 'diamantes'? 'Cantidad de Diamantes' : type === 'dragon' ? 'Cantidad de Aliento de Dragón' : type === 'jupiter' ? 'Cantidad de Estrellas Júpiter' : 'Cantidad de XP Evento'; } } // Puebla el select de items del juego para la ruleta function rlPopulateGameItemSelect() { const sel = document.getElementById('rl-rw-item-id'); if (!sel) return; sel.innerHTML = ''; if (typeof allItems !== 'undefined') { allItems.forEach(it => { const opt = document.createElement('option'); opt.value = it.id; opt.textContent = `${it.name} (${it.rarity || 'común'})`; sel.appendChild(opt); }); } } function rlRwUpdateProbPreview() { rouletteSystem._updateProbBadge(); } // Convierte archivo de video a base64 y lo pone en el campo de texto + preview function rlAdminHandleVideoFile(input, targetFieldId, previewVideoId, previewWrapId) { const file = input.files[0]; if (!file) return; if (!file.type.startsWith('video/')) { showToast('Solo se aceptan archivos de video (MP4, WebM, etc.)', 'error'); return; } // Aviso si el archivo es muy grande (>50 MB) if (file.size > 52428800) { showToast('⚠️ Archivo grande (>50 MB). Puede tardar en cargar.', 'info'); } const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = e => { const b64 = e.target.result; // Escribir base64 en el campo de texto correspondiente const textField = document.getElementById(targetFieldId); if (textField) textField.value = b64; // Mostrar preview si se proporcionaron IDs if (previewVideoId && previewWrapId) { const vid = document.getElementById(previewVideoId); const wrap = document.getElementById(previewWrapId); if (vid && wrap) { vid.src = b64; wrap.style.display = 'block'; vid.load(); vid.play().catch(() => {}); } } showToast('✅ Video cargado. Pulsa "Guardar Videos" para aplicarlo.', 'success'); }; reader.onerror = () => showToast('Error al leer el archivo de video', 'error'); reader.readAsDataURL(file); } function evSaveConfig() { EventoSystem.saveConfig(); } function evSaveMoneda() { EventoSystem.saveMoneda(); } function evSaveEnergia() { EventoSystem.saveEnergia(); } function evSaveItem() { EventoSystem.saveItem(); } function evToggleLock() { EventoSystem.toggleLock(); } function evToggleVisibility() { EventoSystem.toggleVisibility(); } /** Función global para dar XP de evento al jugador actual. * NO afecta player.xp ni player.battlePassLevel normales. * Uso: addEventBattlePassXP(50); */ function addEventBattlePassXP(amount) { EventoSystem.addEventBattlePassXP(amount); } // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // EXPORTS GLOBALES v45 // Expone funciones y constantes del sistema de guardado al scope global // para uso desde la consola, herramientas de admin y sistemas externos. // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ window.PLAYER_SAVE_VERSION = PLAYER_SAVE_VERSION; window.CATALOG_SAVE_VERSION = CATALOG_SAVE_VERSION; window.PLAYER_FIELDS = PLAYER_FIELDS; /** Exporta SOLO datos del jugador actual (sin catálogo). Listo para Firebase. */ window.getPlayerPayload = function() { return currentUser ? _buildPlayerPayload(currentUser) : null; }; /** Exporta SOLO datos del catálogo (admin). Nunca sube a la cuenta de un jugador. */ window.getCatalogPayload = function() { return buildCatalogPayload(); }; /** Fuerza un guardado inmediato local + sync en la nube (si Firebase está activo). */ window.forceSave = function() { saveData(); FirebaseSync.forceSync(); }; /** Muestra estadísticas del estado de guardado en la consola. */ window.debugSaveState = function() { const playerPayload = currentUser ? _buildPlayerPayload(currentUser) : null; const catalogPayload = buildCatalogPayload(); const playerSize = playerPayload ? (JSON.stringify(playerPayload).length / 1024).toFixed(2) + ' KB' : 'N/A'; const catalogSize = (JSON.stringify(catalogPayload).length / 1024).toFixed(2) + ' KB'; console.group('🔍 Epic Quest Save State v' + PLAYER_SAVE_VERSION); console.log('👤 Jugador actual:', currentUser?.username || 'Ninguno'); console.log('📦 Payload jugador:', playerSize); console.log('📚 Payload catálogo:', catalogSize, '(local only)'); console.log('🌐 Firebase activo:', FirebaseSync.isReady()); console.log('📐 Schema version:', PLAYER_SAVE_VERSION); if (currentUser) { console.log(' 🎒 Inventario:', (currentUser.inventory||[]).length, 'items'); console.log(' 🪙 Gold:', currentUser.gold, '| 💎 Diamantes:', currentUser.diamonds); console.log(' ⚔️ Nivel:', currentUser.level, '| XP:', currentUser.xp); console.log(' 🗺️ Mundos completados:', (currentUser.completedWorlds||[]).length); console.log(' 💾 Último guardado:', currentUser._savedAt ? new Date(currentUser._savedAt).toLocaleString('es-CO') : 'N/A'); } console.groupEnd(); }; window.onload = () => init().catch(err => console.error('[init] Error crítico:', err)); // ======================================== // FUNCIONES DEL PANEL DE ADMINISTRADOR // ======================================== // ── PERF: Caché de referencias DOM del panel admin ── const _adminDOMCache = { contents: null, buttons: null, get adminContents() { if (!this.contents || !this.contents[0]?.isConnected) { this.contents = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.admin-content')); } return this.contents; }, get adminButtons() { if (!this.buttons || !this.buttons[0]?.isConnected) { this.buttons = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.admin-tab-btn')); } return this.buttons; }, invalidate() { this.contents = null; this.buttons = null; } }; // ── PERF: Track which admin tabs have already been rendered (lazy loading) ── const _adminTabLoaded = new Set(); // ── PERF: Tabs that must always re-render because data changes frequently ── const _adminTabAlwaysRefresh = new Set(['accounts', 'recargas', 'tienda']); function switchAdminTab(tab) { // PERF: usar cache en lugar de querySelectorAll repetitivo _adminDOMCache.adminContents.forEach(content => content.classList.add('hidden')); _adminDOMCache.adminButtons.forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active')); const tabEl = document.getElementById(`admin-${tab}`); if (tabEl) tabEl.classList.remove('hidden'); if (event && event.target) event.target.classList.add('active'); // PERF: Lazy loading — solo renderizar si no ha sido renderizado aún // o si el tab requiere datos frescos siempre const alreadyLoaded = _adminTabLoaded.has(tab); const mustRefresh = _adminTabAlwaysRefresh.has(tab); if (alreadyLoaded && !mustRefresh) return; // Cargar contenido específico (solo cuando es necesario) RenderManager.debounce('admin-tab-' + tab, () => { if (tab === 'manage-items') { loadManageItems(); } else if (tab === 'create-item') { loadItemsListAdmin(); } else if (tab === 'accounts') { loadAccounts(); } else if (tab === 'create-code') { loadCodesList(); } else if (tab === 'create-pack') { loadPacksList(); } else if (tab === 'create-box') { loadBoxesListAdmin(); } else if (tab === 'create-enemy') { loadEnemiesList(); populateItemRewardSelect('enemy-item-reward'); } else if (tab === 'create-boss') { loadBossesList(); } else if (tab === 'create-world') { loadWorldEnemiesSelector(); loadWorldBossesSelector(); loadWorldsList(); } else if (tab === 'battlepass-config') { loadBattlePassConfig(); } else if (tab === 'damage-calc') { initDamageCalcTable(); } else if (tab === 'gestion') { _gestionQuery = ''; const si = document.getElementById('gestion-search'); if (si) si.value = ''; const fi = document.getElementById('gestion-filter'); if (fi) fi.value = 'all'; renderGestion(); } else if (tab === 'recargas') { switchRecargasTab('bancos'); } else if (tab === 'tienda') { renderAdminTiendaSlots(); } else if (tab === 'codice') { codiceAdminInit(); } _adminTabLoaded.add(tab); }, 60); } function loadAdminPanel() { if (!currentUser || currentUser.username !== 'admin') return; // PERF: Lazy loading — solo renderizar el primer tab visible al abrir el panel. // Los demás tabs se renderizan on-demand al hacer click en ellos. // Esto elimina el renderizado de 10+ listas simultáneas al abrir el admin. _adminTabLoaded.clear(); // Limpiar cache al reabrir panel para datos frescos _adminDOMCache.invalidate(); const firstTab = 'create-item'; // Ocultar todos menos el primero _adminDOMCache.adminContents.forEach(content => content.classList.add('hidden')); const firstEl = document.getElementById('admin-' + firstTab); if (firstEl) firstEl.classList.remove('hidden'); loadItemsListAdmin(); _adminTabLoaded.add(firstTab); // Asegurar que el primer botón quede activo const firstBtn = _adminDOMCache.adminButtons[0]; if (firstBtn) { _adminDOMCache.adminButtons.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active')); firstBtn.classList.add('active'); } } function updateItemForm() { const type = document.getElementById('item-type').value; document.getElementById('equipment-fields').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('mascot-fields').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('card-fields').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('crown-fields').style.display = 'none'; const equipmentTypes = ['casco', 'gafas', 'pechera', 'pantalones', 'botas']; if (equipmentTypes.includes(type)) { document.getElementById('equipment-fields').style.display = 'block'; } else if (type === 'mascota') { document.getElementById('mascot-fields').style.display = 'block'; } else if (type === 'carta') { document.getElementById('card-fields').style.display = 'block'; } else if (type === 'corona') { document.getElementById('crown-fields').style.display = 'block'; } } function createItem() { const type = document.getElementById('item-type').value; const name = document.getElementById('item-name').value.trim(); const image = document.getElementById('item-image').value.trim(); const rarity = document.getElementById('item-rarity').value; const health = parseInt(document.getElementById('item-health').value) || 0; const damage = parseInt(document.getElementById('item-damage').value) || 0; const priceGold = parseInt(document.getElementById('item-price-gold').value) || 0; const priceDiamond = parseInt(document.getElementById('item-price-diamond').value) || 0; const priceDragon = parseInt(document.getElementById('item-price-dragon').value) || 0; const priceJupiter = parseInt((document.getElementById('item-price-jupiter')||{}).value) || 0; const destacado = !!(document.getElementById('item-destacado')||{}).checked; const rotacionDiaria = !!(document.getElementById('item-rotacion-diaria')||{}).checked; const oferta = !!(document.getElementById('item-oferta')||{}).checked; const descuento = parseInt((document.getElementById('item-descuento')||{}).value) || 0; const nivelRequerido = parseInt((document.getElementById('item-nivel-req')||{}).value) || 0; const copasRequeridas = parseInt((document.getElementById('item-copas-req')||{}).value) || 0; if (!name) { alert('Por favor ingresa un nombre'); return; } // Si se marca destacado, quitar destacado de otros items if (destacado) allItems.forEach(i => { i.destacado = false; }); const item = { id: Date.now(), type: type, name: name, image: image || 'https://via.placeholder.com/120?text=Item', rarity: rarity, health: health, damage: damage, priceGold: priceGold, priceDiamond: priceDiamond, priceDragon: priceDragon, priceJupiter: priceJupiter, destacado: destacado, rotacionDiaria: rotacionDiaria, oferta: oferta, descuento: descuento, nivelRequerido: nivelRequerido, copasRequeridas: copasRequeridas, hidden: false }; // Agregar campos específicos const equipmentTypes = ['casco', 'gafas', 'pechera', 'pantalones', 'botas']; if (equipmentTypes.includes(type)) { item.material = document.getElementById('item-material').value.trim(); } else if (type === 'mascota') { item.mascotType = document.getElementById('mascot-type').value; } else if (type === 'carta') { item.cardDescription = document.getElementById('card-description').value.trim(); } else if (type === 'corona') { item.kingdom = document.getElementById('crown-kingdom').value.trim(); } allItems.push(item); debouncedSave(); alert('¡Item creado exitosamente!'); // Limpiar formulario document.getElementById('item-name').value = ''; document.getElementById('item-image').value = ''; const fileInput = document.getElementById('item-image-file'); if (fileInput) fileInput.value = ''; const previewWrap = document.getElementById('item-img-preview-wrap'); if (previewWrap) previewWrap.style.display = 'none'; switchImgTab('url'); document.getElementById('item-health').value = ''; document.getElementById('item-damage').value = ''; document.getElementById('item-price-gold').value = ''; document.getElementById('item-price-diamond').value = ''; document.getElementById('item-price-dragon').value = ''; const jupEl = document.getElementById('item-price-jupiter'); if(jupEl) jupEl.value=''; const destEl = document.getElementById('item-destacado'); if(destEl) destEl.checked=false; const rotEl = document.getElementById('item-rotacion-diaria'); if(rotEl) rotEl.checked=false; const ofEl = document.getElementById('item-oferta'); if(ofEl) ofEl.checked=false; const descEl = document.getElementById('item-descuento'); if(descEl) descEl.value=''; const nrEl = document.getElementById('item-nivel-req'); if(nrEl) nrEl.value=''; const crEl = document.getElementById('item-copas-req'); if(crEl) crEl.value=''; const ofFields = document.getElementById('item-oferta-fields'); if(ofFields) ofFields.style.display='none'; loadManageItems(); loadItemsListAdmin(); _adminTabLoaded.delete('manage-items'); loadShop(); } function toggleEnemyHealFields() { const canHeal = document.getElementById('enemy-can-heal').checked; document.getElementById('enemy-heal-fields').style.display = canHeal ? 'block' : 'none'; } // ── Poblar selector de items en formularios ────────────────────────────── function populateItemRewardSelect(selectId) { const sel = document.getElementById(selectId); if (!sel) return; const prev = sel.value; sel.innerHTML = ''; (allItems || []).forEach(function(item) { const opt = document.createElement('option'); opt.value = item.id; opt.textContent = '[' + item.id + '] ' + item.name + ' (' + (item.rarity || 'común') + ')'; sel.appendChild(opt); }); if (prev) sel.value = prev; } function createEnemy() { const name = document.getElementById('enemy-name').value.trim(); const image = document.getElementById('enemy-image').value.trim(); const health = parseInt(document.getElementById('enemy-health').value) || 100; const environment = document.getElementById('enemy-environment').value; const cups = parseInt(document.getElementById('enemy-cups').value) || 100; const gold = parseInt(document.getElementById('enemy-gold').value) || 0; const diamonds = parseInt(document.getElementById('enemy-diamonds').value) || 0; const dragonBreath = parseInt(document.getElementById('enemy-dragon-breath').value) || 0; const jupiterStars = parseInt(document.getElementById('enemy-jupiter').value) || 0; const xp = parseInt(document.getElementById('enemy-xp').value) || 50; const itemReward = document.getElementById('enemy-item-reward').value || null; const energyCost = parseInt(document.getElementById('enemy-energy-cost').value) || 10; const attackVal = parseInt(document.getElementById('enemy-attack').value) || 50; const canHeal = document.getElementById('enemy-can-heal').checked; const healAmount = parseInt(document.getElementById('enemy-heal-amount').value) || 10; const healInterval = parseInt(document.getElementById('enemy-heal-interval').value) || 5; if (!name) { alert('Por favor ingresa un nombre para el enemigo'); return; } if (attackVal <= 0) { alert('El daño de ataque debe ser mayor a 0'); return; } const enemy = { id: Date.now(), name: name, image: image || 'https://via.placeholder.com/200?text=Enemigo', health: health, maxHealth: health, attack: attackVal, environment: environment, cupsReward: cups, goldReward: gold, diamondReward: diamonds, dragonBreathReward: dragonBreath, jupiterReward: jupiterStars, xp: xp, energyCost: energyCost, itemReward: itemReward || null, canHeal: canHeal, healAmount: canHeal ? healAmount : 0, healInterval: canHeal ? healInterval : 0, type: 'enemy' }; allEnemies.push(enemy); debouncedSave(); alert('¡Enemigo creado exitosamente!'); // Limpiar formulario document.getElementById('enemy-name').value = ''; document.getElementById('enemy-image').value = ''; document.getElementById('enemy-health').value = ''; document.getElementById('enemy-cups').value = '100'; document.getElementById('enemy-gold').value = '0'; document.getElementById('enemy-diamonds').value = '0'; document.getElementById('enemy-dragon-breath').value = '0'; document.getElementById('enemy-xp').value = '50'; document.getElementById('enemy-item-reward').value = ''; document.getElementById('enemy-energy-cost').value = '10'; document.getElementById('enemy-attack').value = '50'; document.getElementById('enemy-can-heal').checked = false; toggleEnemyHealFields(); loadEnemiesList(); // PERF: Invalidar cache lazy de create-world (usa selectores de enemigos) _adminTabLoaded.delete('create-world'); _adminTabLoaded.delete('gestion'); } function loadEnemiesList() { const container = document.getElementById('enemies-list'); if (allEnemies.length === 0) { container.innerHTML = '

Enemigos Creados

No hay enemigos creados

'; return; } container.innerHTML = '

Enemigos Creados

' + allEnemies.map((enemy, index) => `
${enemy.name}
ID: ${enemy.id}
Vida: ${enemy.health}
⚔️ Ataque: ${enemy.attack || 10}
Entorno: ${enemy.environment}
Copas: ${enemy.cupsReward || 100}
${enemy.goldReward > 0 ? `
Oro: ${enemy.goldReward}
` : ''} ${enemy.diamondReward > 0 ? `
Diamantes: ${enemy.diamondReward}
` : ''} ${enemy.dragonBreathReward > 0 ? `
Aliento: ${enemy.dragonBreathReward}
` : ''}
⚡ Energía: ${enemy.energyCost != null ? enemy.energyCost : 10}
${enemy.itemReward ? `
🎁 Item: ${(allItems.find(i=>String(i.id)===String(enemy.itemReward))||{name:'ID:'+enemy.itemReward}).name}
` : ''} ${enemy.canHeal ? `
Se cura: ${enemy.healAmount} cada ${enemy.healInterval}s
` : ''}
`).join(''); } function deleteEnemy(index) { if (!confirm('¿Eliminar este enemigo?')) return; allEnemies.splice(index, 1); debouncedSave(); loadEnemiesList(); _adminTabLoaded.delete('create-world'); // PERF: invalidar selector de mundos } function toggleBossHealFields() { const canHeal = document.getElementById('boss-can-heal').checked; document.getElementById('boss-heal-fields').style.display = canHeal ? 'block' : 'none'; } function createBoss() { const name = document.getElementById('boss-name').value.trim(); const image = document.getElementById('boss-image').value.trim(); const health = parseInt(document.getElementById('boss-health').value) || 1000; const shield = parseInt(document.getElementById('boss-shield').value) || 0; const environment = document.getElementById('boss-environment').value; const cups = parseInt(document.getElementById('boss-cups').value) || 500; const gold = parseInt(document.getElementById('boss-gold').value) || 0; const diamonds = parseInt(document.getElementById('boss-diamonds').value) || 0; const dragonBreath = parseInt(document.getElementById('boss-dragon-breath').value) || 0; const jupiterStars = parseInt(document.getElementById('boss-jupiter').value) || 0; const xp = parseInt(document.getElementById('boss-xp').value) || 200; const itemReward = document.getElementById('boss-item-reward').value || null; const energyCost = parseInt(document.getElementById('boss-energy-cost').value) || 20; const bossAttackVal = parseInt(document.getElementById('boss-attack').value) || 150; const canHeal = document.getElementById('boss-can-heal').checked; const healAmount = parseInt(document.getElementById('boss-heal-amount').value) || 20; const healInterval = parseInt(document.getElementById('boss-heal-interval').value) || 10; if (!name) { alert('Por favor ingresa un nombre para el jefe'); return; } if (bossAttackVal <= 0) { alert('El daño de ataque debe ser mayor a 0'); return; } const boss = { id: Date.now(), name: name, image: image || 'https://via.placeholder.com/200?text=Jefe', health: health, maxHealth: health, shield: shield, maxShield: shield, attack: bossAttackVal, environment: environment, cupsReward: cups, goldReward: gold, diamondReward: diamonds, dragonBreathReward: dragonBreath, jupiterReward: jupiterStars, xp: xp, energyCost: energyCost, itemReward: itemReward || null, canHeal: canHeal, healAmount: canHeal ? healAmount : 0, healInterval: canHeal ? healInterval : 0, type: 'boss' }; allBosses.push(boss); debouncedSave(); alert('¡Jefe creado exitosamente!'); // Limpiar formulario document.getElementById('boss-name').value = ''; document.getElementById('boss-image').value = ''; document.getElementById('boss-health').value = ''; document.getElementById('boss-shield').value = '0'; document.getElementById('boss-cups').value = '500'; document.getElementById('boss-gold').value = '0'; document.getElementById('boss-diamonds').value = '0'; document.getElementById('boss-dragon-breath').value = '0'; document.getElementById('boss-xp').value = '200'; document.getElementById('boss-item-reward').value = ''; document.getElementById('boss-energy-cost').value = '20'; document.getElementById('boss-attack').value = '150'; document.getElementById('boss-can-heal').checked = false; toggleBossHealFields(); loadBossesList(); _adminTabLoaded.delete('gestion'); } function loadBossesList() { const container = document.getElementById('bosses-list'); if (allBosses.length === 0) { container.innerHTML = '

Jefes Creados

No hay jefes creados

'; return; } container.innerHTML = '

Jefes Creados

' + allBosses.map((boss, index) => `
${boss.name}
ID: ${boss.id}
Vida: ${boss.health}
Escudo: ${boss.shield}
⚔️ Ataque: ${boss.attack || 10}
Entorno: ${boss.environment}
Copas: ${boss.cupsReward || 500}
${boss.goldReward > 0 ? `
Oro: ${boss.goldReward}
` : ''} ${boss.diamondReward > 0 ? `
Diamantes: ${boss.diamondReward}
` : ''} ${boss.dragonBreathReward > 0 ? `
Aliento: ${boss.dragonBreathReward}
` : ''}
⚡ Energía: ${boss.energyCost != null ? boss.energyCost : 20}
${boss.itemReward ? `
🎁 Item: ${(allItems.find(i=>String(i.id)===String(boss.itemReward))||{name:'ID:'+boss.itemReward}).name}
` : ''} ${boss.canHeal ? `
Se cura: ${boss.healAmount} cada ${boss.healInterval}s
` : ''}
`).join(''); } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // PANEL GESTIÓN — búsqueda ligera sin imágenes, event delegation // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ let _gestionSearchTimer = null; let _gestionQuery = ''; function gestionSearchDebounce(val) { clearTimeout(_gestionSearchTimer); _gestionSearchTimer = setTimeout(() => { _gestionQuery = val.trim().toLowerCase(); renderGestion(); }, 300); } // ── Event delegation para botones Editar en Gestión (se registra UNA sola vez) ── let _gestionDelegationSet = false; function _setupGestionDelegation() { if (_gestionDelegationSet) return; const container = document.getElementById('gestion-results'); if (!container) return; container.addEventListener('click', function(e) { const btn = e.target.closest('.btn-gestion-editar'); if (!btn) return; const type = btn.dataset.type; const id = btn.dataset.id; if (!type || !id) return; _gestionAbrirEditar(type, id); }); _gestionDelegationSet = true; } // ── Helper: celda estilizada ── function _gtd(content, extra) { return '' + content + ''; } // ── Helper: botón Editar con data-attributes ── function _gBtnEditar(type, id) { return '' + ''; } // ── Helper: construir tabla con DocumentFragment ── function _gestionBuildTable(headers, rows) { const frag = document.createDocumentFragment(); const table = document.createElement('table'); table.style.cssText = 'width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.85rem;margin-bottom:12px;'; // thead const thead = document.createElement('thead'); const trHead = document.createElement('tr'); trHead.style.background = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.08)'; headers.forEach(function(h) { const th = document.createElement('th'); th.style.cssText = 'padding:8px;text-align:left;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;'; th.textContent = h; trHead.appendChild(th); }); thead.appendChild(trHead); table.appendChild(thead); // tbody via innerHTML (rows already sanitized) const tbody = document.createElement('tbody'); tbody.innerHTML = rows.join(''); table.appendChild(tbody); frag.appendChild(table); return frag; } function renderGestion() { const container = document.getElementById('gestion-results'); if (!container) return; // Registrar delegación una sola vez _setupGestionDelegation(); const filter = (document.getElementById('gestion-filter') || {}).value || 'all'; const q = _gestionQuery; function matchName(name) { return !q || (name && name.toLowerCase().includes(q)); } // Limpiar contenedor de forma eficiente while (container.firstChild) container.removeChild(container.firstChild); let totalSections = 0; const frag = document.createDocumentFragment(); function addSection(label, color, tableHeaders, tableRows) { if (!tableRows.length) return; totalSections++; const h4 = document.createElement('h4'); h4.style.cssText = 'color:' + color + ';margin:18px 0 8px;'; h4.textContent = label + ' (' + tableRows.length + ')'; frag.appendChild(h4); frag.appendChild(_gestionBuildTable(tableHeaders, tableRows)); } const TD = _gtd; const TDs = function(t) { return TD(t, 'color:var(--text-secondary);'); }; const TDg = function(t) { return TD(t, 'color:#ffd700;'); }; const TDw = function(t) { return TD(t, 'color:#ffaa00;'); }; const TDb = function(t) { return TD(t, 'color:#00d4ff;'); }; const TR = function(cells) { return '' + cells + ''; }; // ── ITEMS ────────────────────────────────────────────── if (filter === 'all' || filter === 'items') { const rows = (allItems || []).filter(function(i) { return matchName(i.name); }); const tableRows = rows.map(function(item) { const prices = []; if (item.priceGold) prices.push('🪙' + item.priceGold); if (item.priceDiamond) prices.push('💎' + item.priceDiamond); if (item.priceDragon) prices.push('🔥' + item.priceDragon); const estado = item.hidden ? '🔴 Oculto' : '🟢 Activo'; return TR( TDs(item.id) + TD('' + (item.name || '—') + '') + TD(item.type || '—') + TD(item.rarity || '—') + TDg(prices.join(' ') || '—') + TD(item.health || 0) + TD('⚔️ ' + (item.damage || item.attack || 0)) + TD(estado) + _gBtnEditar('item', item.id) ); }); addSection('🗡️ Items', '#7b2cbf', ['ID', 'Nombre', 'Tipo', 'Rareza', 'Precio', 'Vida', 'Daño', 'Estado', ''], tableRows); } // ── CAJAS ────────────────────────────────────────────── if (filter === 'all' || filter === 'boxes') { const rows = (allBoxes || []).filter(function(b) { return matchName(b.name); }); const tableRows = rows.map(function(b) { const prices = []; if (b.priceGold) prices.push('🪙' + b.priceGold); if (b.priceDiamond) prices.push('💎' + b.priceDiamond); if (b.priceJupiter) prices.push('⭐' + b.priceJupiter); if (b.price) prices.push('🪙' + b.price); return TR( TDs(b.id) + TD('' + (b.name || '—') + '') + TD(b.rarity || '—') + TDg(prices.join(' ') || '0') + _gBtnEditar('box', b.id) ); }); addSection('🎁 Cajas', '#ffd700', ['ID', 'Nombre', 'Rareza', 'Precio', ''], tableRows); } // ── SOBRES ──────────────────────────────────────────── if (filter === 'all' || filter === 'packs') { const rows = (allPacks || []).filter(function(p) { return matchName(p.name); }); const tableRows = rows.map(function(p) { const prices = []; if (p.priceGold) prices.push('🪙' + p.priceGold); if (p.priceDiamond) prices.push('💎' + p.priceDiamond); if (p.priceDragon) prices.push('🔥' + p.priceDragon); return TR( TDs(p.id) + TD('' + (p.name || '—') + '') + TDg(prices.join(' ') || '0') + TD(((p.items && p.items.length) || 0) + ' items') + _gBtnEditar('pack', p.id) ); }); addSection('📦 Sobres', '#00d4ff', ['ID', 'Nombre', 'Precio', 'Items', ''], tableRows); } // ── MUNDOS ──────────────────────────────────────────── if (filter === 'all' || filter === 'worlds') { const rows = (allWorlds || []).filter(function(w) { return matchName(w.name); }); const lockIcons = { sequential: '🔒 Secuencial', unlocked: '🔓 Libre', purchasable: '💰 Comprable' }; const currencyIcons = { oro: '🪙', diamante: '💎', alientoDragon: '🔥', estrellasJupiter: '⭐' }; const tableRows = rows.map(function(w) { const priceStr = w.lockMode === 'purchasable' ? ((currencyIcons[w.purchaseCurrency] || '🪙') + ' ' + (w.purchasePrice || 0)) : '—'; return TR( TDs(w.id) + TD('' + (w.name || '—') + '') + TD(lockIcons[w.lockMode] || w.lockMode || '—') + TD(((w.levels && w.levels.length) || 0) + ' niveles') + TDg(priceStr) + _gBtnEditar('world', w.id) ); }); addSection('🌍 Mundos', '#9d4edd', ['ID', 'Nombre', 'Estado', 'Niveles', 'Precio', ''], tableRows); } // ── ENEMIGOS ────────────────────────────────────────── if (filter === 'all' || filter === 'enemies') { const rows = (allEnemies || []).filter(function(e) { return matchName(e.name); }); const tableRows = rows.map(function(e) { return TR( TDs(e.id) + TD('' + (e.name || '—') + '') + TD(e.health || 0) + TDw('⚔️ ' + (e.attack || 10)) + TD(e.environment || '—') + TDg('🏆 ' + (e.cupsReward || 0)) + TD(e.canHeal ? '✅ ' + e.healAmount + '/' + e.healInterval + 's' : '—') + _gBtnEditar('enemy', e.id) ); }); addSection('💀 Enemigos', '#d90429', ['ID', 'Nombre', 'Vida', 'Ataque', 'Entorno', 'Copas', 'Curación', ''], tableRows); } // ── JEFES ───────────────────────────────────────────── if (filter === 'all' || filter === 'bosses') { const rows = (allBosses || []).filter(function(b) { return matchName(b.name); }); const tableRows = rows.map(function(b) { return TR( TDs(b.id) + TD('' + (b.name || '—') + '') + TD(b.health || 0) + TDw('⚔️ ' + (b.attack || 10)) + TDb('🛡️ ' + (b.shield || 0)) + TD(b.environment || '—') + TDg('🏆 ' + (b.cupsReward || 0)) + _gBtnEditar('boss', b.id) ); }); addSection('🐉 Jefes', '#ff6d00', ['ID', 'Nombre', 'Vida', 'Ataque', 'Escudo', 'Entorno', 'Copas', ''], tableRows); } if (totalSections === 0) { const p = document.createElement('p'); p.style.cssText = 'text-align:center;color:var(--text-secondary);padding:40px 0;'; p.textContent = q ? '🔍 Sin resultados para "' + q + '"' : '📭 No hay datos en esta categoría'; container.appendChild(p); } else { container.appendChild(frag); } } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // EDITAR ELEMENTO DESDE GESTIÓN — abre modal con datos actuales // Usa el id string del dataset y busca en los arrays globales // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function _gestionAbrirEditar(type, idStr) { const id = isNaN(idStr) ? idStr : Number(idStr); if (type === 'item') { // Reutilizar función de edición ya existente if (typeof editItem === 'function') { editItem(id); return; } } let obj = null; let fieldsHTML = ''; let titleLabel = ''; let saveCallback = null; if (type === 'box') { obj = (allBoxes || []).find(function(b) { return b.id == id; }); if (!obj) { showToast('Caja no encontrada', 'error'); return; } titleLabel = '🎁 Editar Caja: ' + obj.name; fieldsHTML = _gFormField('Nombre', 'text', 'ge-name', obj.name || '') + _gFormField('Rareza', 'text', 'ge-rarity', obj.rarity || '') + _gFormField('Precio Oro (🪙)', 'number', 'ge-priceGold', obj.priceGold || obj.price || 0) + _gFormField('Precio Diamantes (💎)', 'number', 'ge-priceDiamond', obj.priceDiamond || 0) + _gFormField('Precio Júpiter (⭐)', 'number', 'ge-priceJupiter', obj.priceJupiter || 0); saveCallback = function() { obj.name = document.getElementById('ge-name').value.trim() || obj.name; obj.rarity = document.getElementById('ge-rarity').value.trim() || obj.rarity; obj.priceGold = parseInt(document.getElementById('ge-priceGold').value) || 0; obj.priceDiamond = parseInt(document.getElementById('ge-priceDiamond').value) || 0; obj.priceJupiter = parseInt(document.getElementById('ge-priceJupiter').value) || 0; obj.price = obj.priceGold; // compatibilidad }; } else if (type === 'pack') { obj = (allPacks || []).find(function(p) { return p.id == id; }); if (!obj) { showToast('Sobre no encontrado', 'error'); return; } titleLabel = '📦 Editar Sobre: ' + obj.name; fieldsHTML = _gFormField('Nombre', 'text', 'ge-name', obj.name || '') + _gFormField('Precio Oro (🪙)', 'number', 'ge-priceGold', obj.priceGold || 0) + _gFormField('Precio Diamantes (💎)', 'number', 'ge-priceDiamond', obj.priceDiamond || 0) + _gFormField('Precio Aliento (🔥)', 'number', 'ge-priceDragon', obj.priceDragon || 0); saveCallback = function() { obj.name = document.getElementById('ge-name').value.trim() || obj.name; obj.priceGold = parseInt(document.getElementById('ge-priceGold').value) || 0; obj.priceDiamond = parseInt(document.getElementById('ge-priceDiamond').value) || 0; obj.priceDragon = parseInt(document.getElementById('ge-priceDragon').value) || 0; }; } else if (type === 'world') { obj = (allWorlds || []).find(function(w) { return w.id == id; }); if (!obj) { showToast('Mundo no encontrado', 'error'); return; } titleLabel = '🌍 Editar Mundo: ' + obj.name; fieldsHTML = _gFormField('Nombre', 'text', 'ge-name', obj.name || '') + _gFormSelect('Modo de acceso', 'ge-lockMode', [ { value: 'sequential', label: '🔒 Secuencial' }, { value: 'unlocked', label: '🔓 Libre' }, { value: 'purchasable',label: '💰 Comprable' } ], obj.lockMode) + _gFormField('Precio de compra', 'number', 'ge-purchasePrice', obj.purchasePrice || 0) + _gFormSelect('Moneda de compra', 'ge-purchaseCurrency', [ { value: 'oro', label: '🪙 Oro' }, { value: 'diamante', label: '💎 Diamante' }, { value: 'alientoDragon', label: '🔥 Aliento de Dragón' }, { value: 'estrellasJupiter',label: '⭐ Estrellas Júpiter' } ], obj.purchaseCurrency); saveCallback = function() { obj.name = document.getElementById('ge-name').value.trim() || obj.name; obj.lockMode = document.getElementById('ge-lockMode').value; obj.purchasePrice = parseInt(document.getElementById('ge-purchasePrice').value) || 0; obj.purchaseCurrency = document.getElementById('ge-purchaseCurrency').value; }; } else if (type === 'enemy') { obj = (allEnemies || []).find(function(e) { return e.id == id; }); if (!obj) { showToast('Enemigo no encontrado', 'error'); return; } titleLabel = '💀 Editar Enemigo: ' + obj.name; fieldsHTML = _gFormField('Nombre', 'text', 'ge-name', obj.name || '') + _gFormField('Vida', 'number', 'ge-health', obj.health || 0) + _gFormField('Ataque', 'number', 'ge-attack', obj.attack || 10) + _gFormField('Entorno', 'text', 'ge-environment', obj.environment || '') + _gFormField('Recompensa Copas', 'number', 'ge-cupsReward', obj.cupsReward || 0); saveCallback = function() { obj.name = document.getElementById('ge-name').value.trim() || obj.name; obj.health = parseInt(document.getElementById('ge-health').value) || 0; obj.attack = parseInt(document.getElementById('ge-attack').value) || 10; obj.environment = document.getElementById('ge-environment').value.trim(); obj.cupsReward = parseInt(document.getElementById('ge-cupsReward').value) || 0; }; } else if (type === 'boss') { obj = (allBosses || []).find(function(b) { return b.id == id; }); if (!obj) { showToast('Jefe no encontrado', 'error'); return; } titleLabel = '🐉 Editar Jefe: ' + obj.name; fieldsHTML = _gFormField('Nombre', 'text', 'ge-name', obj.name || '') + _gFormField('Vida', 'number', 'ge-health', obj.health || 0) + _gFormField('Ataque', 'number', 'ge-attack', obj.attack || 10) + _gFormField('Escudo', 'number', 'ge-shield', obj.shield || 0) + _gFormField('Entorno', 'text', 'ge-environment', obj.environment || '') + _gFormField('Recompensa Copas', 'number', 'ge-cupsReward', obj.cupsReward || 0); saveCallback = function() { obj.name = document.getElementById('ge-name').value.trim() || obj.name; obj.health = parseInt(document.getElementById('ge-health').value) || 0; obj.attack = parseInt(document.getElementById('ge-attack').value) || 10; obj.shield = parseInt(document.getElementById('ge-shield').value) || 0; obj.environment = document.getElementById('ge-environment').value.trim(); obj.cupsReward = parseInt(document.getElementById('ge-cupsReward').value) || 0; }; } if (!obj || !saveCallback) return; // Construir modal const modal = document.createElement('div'); modal.className = 'modal active'; modal.style.zIndex = '99998'; modal.innerHTML = '
' + '' + '

' + titleLabel + '

' + fieldsHTML + '
' + '' + '' + '
'; document.body.appendChild(modal); document.getElementById('ge-save-btn').addEventListener('click', function() { try { saveCallback(); debouncedSave(); // Refrescar solo Gestión renderGestion(); if (typeof loadShop === 'function') loadShop(); modal.remove(); if (typeof showToast === 'function') showToast('✅ Cambios guardados', 'success'); } catch(err) { console.error('[Gestión] Error al guardar:', err); if (typeof showToast === 'function') showToast('❌ Error al guardar', 'error'); } }); } // ── Helpers de formularios para el modal de Gestión ── function _gFormField(label, type, id, value) { var safeVal = String(value).replace(/"/g, '"'); return '
' + '' + '' + '
'; } function _gFormSelect(label, id, options, selected) { var opts = options.map(function(o) { return ''; }).join(''); return '
' + '' + '
'; } function deleteBoss(index) { if (!confirm('¿Eliminar este jefe?')) return; allBosses.splice(index, 1); debouncedSave(); loadBossesList(); } function loadWorldEnemiesSelector() { const container = document.getElementById('world-enemies-selector'); if (allEnemies.length === 0) { container.innerHTML = '

No hay enemigos creados aún. Crea enemigos primero en la pestaña "Crear Enemigo"

'; return; } container.innerHTML = allEnemies.map(enemy => ` `).join(''); } function toggleEnemyQuantity(enemyId) { const checkbox = document.querySelector(`.world-enemy-checkbox[value="${enemyId}"]`); const quantityInput = document.getElementById(`enemy-quantity-${enemyId}`); quantityInput.disabled = !checkbox.checked; if (!checkbox.checked) { quantityInput.value = 1; } } function loadWorldBossesSelector() { const container = document.getElementById('world-bosses-selector'); if (allBosses.length === 0) { container.innerHTML = '

No hay jefes creados aún. Crea jefes primero en la pestaña "Crear Jefe"

'; return; } container.innerHTML = allBosses.map(boss => ` `).join(''); } function toggleBossQuantity(bossId) { const checkbox = document.querySelector(`.world-boss-checkbox[value="${bossId}"]`); const quantityInput = document.getElementById(`boss-quantity-${bossId}`); quantityInput.disabled = !checkbox.checked; if (!checkbox.checked) { quantityInput.value = 1; } } function generateEnemyFields() { const count = parseInt(document.getElementById('world-enemies-count').value) || 1; const container = document.getElementById('enemies-container'); container.innerHTML = ''; // PERF: DocumentFragment evita re-layout en cada iteración (antes era innerHTML += en loop) const _frag = document.createDocumentFragment(); for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) { const _tmpDiv = document.createElement('div'); _tmpDiv.innerHTML = `

Enemigo ${i + 1}

`; _frag.appendChild(_tmpDiv.firstElementChild); } container.appendChild(_frag); } function createWorld() { const name = document.getElementById('world-name').value.trim(); const image = document.getElementById('world-image').value.trim(); const background = document.getElementById('world-background').value.trim(); const playLimit = parseInt(document.getElementById('world-play-limit').value) || 0; const worldLockedSel = document.getElementById('world-locked'); const worldLockMode = worldLockedSel ? worldLockedSel.value : 'sequential'; const worldPurchasePrice = worldLockMode === 'purchasable' ? (parseInt(document.getElementById('world-purchase-price').value) || 1000) : 0; const worldPurchaseCurrency = worldLockMode === 'purchasable' ? (document.getElementById('world-purchase-currency').value || 'oro') : null; if (!name) { alert('Por favor ingresa un nombre para el mundo'); return; } // Obtener enemigos seleccionados con cantidades const enemies = []; document.querySelectorAll('.world-enemy-checkbox:checked').forEach(checkbox => { const enemyId = parseInt(checkbox.value); const quantity = parseInt(document.getElementById(`enemy-quantity-${enemyId}`).value) || 1; const enemyTemplate = allEnemies.find(e => e.id === enemyId); if (enemyTemplate) { // Agregar múltiples copias del enemigo según la cantidad for (let i = 0; i < quantity; i++) { enemies.push({...enemyTemplate}); } } }); // Obtener jefes seleccionados con cantidades const bosses = []; document.querySelectorAll('.world-boss-checkbox:checked').forEach(checkbox => { const bossId = parseInt(checkbox.value); const quantity = parseInt(document.getElementById(`boss-quantity-${bossId}`).value) || 1; const bossTemplate = allBosses.find(b => b.id === bossId); if (bossTemplate) { // Agregar múltiples copias del jefe según la cantidad for (let i = 0; i < quantity; i++) { bosses.push({...bossTemplate}); } } }); if (enemies.length === 0 && bosses.length === 0) { alert('Por favor selecciona al menos un enemigo o jefe para el mundo'); return; } // Generar niveles automáticamente const levels = []; let levelNumber = 1; // Crear niveles con enemigos enemies.forEach(enemy => { levels.push({ id: Date.now() + levelNumber, number: levelNumber, enemyId: enemy.id, bossId: null, rewardGold: enemy.goldReward || enemy.gold || 50, rewardCups: enemy.cupsReward || enemy.cups || 10 }); levelNumber++; }); // Crear niveles con jefes bosses.forEach(boss => { levels.push({ id: Date.now() + levelNumber, number: levelNumber, enemyId: null, bossId: boss.id, rewardGold: boss.goldReward || boss.gold || 200, rewardCups: boss.cupsReward || boss.cups || 50 }); levelNumber++; }); const world = { id: Date.now(), name: name, image: image || 'https://via.placeholder.com/250x150?text=Mundo', background: background || 'https://via.placeholder.com/1920x1080?text=Fondo', playLimit: playLimit, lockMode: worldLockMode, purchasePrice: worldPurchasePrice, purchaseCurrency: worldPurchaseCurrency, enemies: enemies, bosses: bosses, levels: levels, rewardGold: levels.reduce((sum, l) => sum + l.rewardGold, 0), rewardDiamonds: Math.floor(levels.length * 5), rewardDragonBreath: Math.floor(levels.length * 2) }; allWorlds.push(world); console.log('Mundo creado:', world); console.log('Total de mundos:', allWorlds.length); debouncedSave(); let message = `¡Mundo creado exitosamente!\nEnemigos: ${enemies.length}\nJefes: ${bosses.length}`; if (playLimit > 0) { message += `\nLímite de jugadas: ${playLimit}`; } else { message += `\nLímite de jugadas: Ilimitado`; } alert(message); // Limpiar formulario document.getElementById('world-name').value = ''; document.getElementById('world-image').value = ''; document.getElementById('world-background').value = ''; document.getElementById('world-play-limit').value = '0'; document.querySelectorAll('.world-enemy-checkbox').forEach(cb => { cb.checked = false; toggleEnemyQuantity(parseInt(cb.value)); }); document.querySelectorAll('.world-boss-checkbox').forEach(cb => { cb.checked = false; toggleBossQuantity(parseInt(cb.value)); }); loadWorlds(); loadWorldsList(); } function loadWorldsList() { const container = document.getElementById('worlds-list'); if (allWorlds.length === 0) { container.innerHTML = '

Mundos Creados

No hay mundos creados

'; return; } container.innerHTML = '

Mundos Creados

' + allWorlds.map((world, index) => `
${world.name}
ID: ${world.id}
Enemigos: ${world.enemies ? world.enemies.length : 0}
Jefes: ${world.bosses ? world.bosses.length : 0}
${world.lockMode === 'unlocked' ? '🔓 Desbloqueado' : '🔒 Secuencial'}
`).join(''); } function deleteWorld(index) { if (!confirm('¿Eliminar este mundo?')) return; allWorlds.splice(index, 1); debouncedSave(); loadWorlds(); loadWorldsList(); } let _editWorldIndex = -1; function openEditWorldModal(index) { _editWorldIndex = index; const world = allWorlds[index]; if (!world) return; // Crear modal si no existe let modal = document.getElementById('edit-world-modal'); if (!modal) { modal = document.createElement('div'); modal.id = 'edit-world-modal'; modal.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:99998;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.85);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:16px;'; modal.innerHTML = `

✏️ Editar Mundo

`; document.body.appendChild(modal); } // Rellenar campos document.getElementById('edit-world-name').value = world.name || ''; document.getElementById('edit-world-image').value = world.image || ''; document.getElementById('edit-world-background').value = world.background || ''; document.getElementById('edit-world-play-limit').value = world.playLimit || 0; document.getElementById('edit-world-locked').value = world.lockMode || 'sequential'; modal.style.display = 'flex'; } function closeEditWorldModal() { const modal = document.getElementById('edit-world-modal'); if (modal) modal.style.display = 'none'; } function saveEditWorld() { if (_editWorldIndex < 0 || _editWorldIndex >= allWorlds.length) return; const world = allWorlds[_editWorldIndex]; const newName = document.getElementById('edit-world-name').value.trim(); if (!newName) { alert('El nombre no puede estar vacío'); return; } world.name = newName; world.image = document.getElementById('edit-world-image').value.trim() || world.image; world.background = document.getElementById('edit-world-background').value.trim() || world.background; world.playLimit = parseInt(document.getElementById('edit-world-play-limit').value) || 0; world.lockMode = document.getElementById('edit-world-locked').value; debouncedSave(); loadWorlds(); loadWorldsList(); closeEditWorldModal(); showToast('✅ Mundo actualizado correctamente', 'success'); } function addPackRewardItem() { const itemId = prompt('Ingresa el ID del item (ver en Gestionar Items):'); if (!itemId) return; const item = allItems.find(i => i.id == itemId); if (!item) { alert('Item no encontrado'); return; } const chance = parseFloat(prompt('Probabilidad de obtenerlo (0-100):')) || 100; currentPackRewards.push({ type: 'item', itemId: item.id, chance: chance }); updatePackRewardsDisplay(); } function addPackRewardCurrency() { const gold = parseInt(prompt('Oro:')) || 0; const diamonds = parseInt(prompt('Diamantes:')) || 0; const dragonBreath = parseInt(prompt('Aliento de Dragón:')) || 0; const energy = parseInt(prompt('Energía:')) || 0; const jupiterStars = parseInt(prompt('Estrellas Júpiter:')) || 0; const eventCoins = parseInt(prompt('Moneda de Evento:')) || 0; const chance = parseFloat(prompt('Probabilidad de obtenerlo (0-100):')) || 100; if (gold === 0 && diamonds === 0 && dragonBreath === 0 && energy === 0 && jupiterStars === 0 && eventCoins === 0) return; currentPackRewards.push({ type: 'currency', gold: gold, diamonds: diamonds, dragonBreath: dragonBreath, energy: energy, jupiterStars: jupiterStars, eventCoins: eventCoins, chance: chance }); updatePackRewardsDisplay(); } function updatePackRewardsDisplay() { const container = document.getElementById('pack-rewards-container'); if (currentPackRewards.length === 0) { container.innerHTML = '

Agrega items y monedas al sobre

'; return; } container.innerHTML = currentPackRewards.map((reward, index) => { if (reward.type === 'item') { const item = allItems.find(i => i.id === reward.itemId); return `
Item: ${item ? item.name : 'Desconocido'} (${reward.chance}%)
`; } else { let text = 'Recursos: '; if (reward.gold > 0) text += `${reward.gold} Oro `; if (reward.diamonds > 0) text += `${reward.diamonds} Diamantes `; if (reward.dragonBreath > 0) text += `${reward.dragonBreath} Aliento `; if (reward.energy > 0) text += `${reward.energy} Energía `; if (reward.jupiterStars > 0) text += `${reward.jupiterStars} ⭐Júpiter `; if (reward.eventCoins > 0) text += `${reward.eventCoins} 🪙Moneda Evento `; text += `(${reward.chance}%)`; return `
${text}
`; } }).join(''); } function removePackReward(index) { currentPackRewards.splice(index, 1); updatePackRewardsDisplay(); } function createPack() { const name = document.getElementById('pack-name').value.trim(); const image = document.getElementById('pack-image').value.trim(); const priceGold = parseInt(document.getElementById('pack-price-gold').value) || 0; const priceDiamond = parseInt(document.getElementById('pack-price-diamond').value) || 0; const priceDragon = parseInt(document.getElementById('pack-price-dragon').value) || 0; const priceJupiter = parseInt(document.getElementById('pack-price-jupiter').value) || 0; if (!name) { alert('Por favor ingresa un nombre'); return; } if (currentPackRewards.length === 0) { alert('Por favor agrega al menos una recompensa'); return; } const pack = { id: Date.now(), name: name, image: image || 'https://via.placeholder.com/250x150?text=Sobre', priceGold: priceGold, priceDiamond: priceDiamond, priceDragon: priceDragon, priceJupiter: priceJupiter, rewards: [...currentPackRewards] }; allPacks.push(pack); debouncedSave(); alert('¡Sobre creado exitosamente!'); // Limpiar formulario document.getElementById('pack-name').value = ''; document.getElementById('pack-image').value = ''; document.getElementById('pack-price-gold').value = ''; document.getElementById('pack-price-diamond').value = ''; document.getElementById('pack-price-dragon').value = ''; currentPackRewards = []; updatePackRewardsDisplay(); loadPacks(); loadPacksList(); } function loadPacksList() { const container = document.getElementById('packs-list-admin'); if (allPacks.length === 0) { container.innerHTML = '

Sobres Creados

No hay sobres creados

'; return; } container.innerHTML = '

Sobres Creados

' + allPacks.map((pack, index) => { const prices = []; if (pack.priceGold > 0) prices.push(`${pack.priceGold} Oro`); if (pack.priceDiamond > 0) prices.push(`${pack.priceDiamond} Diamantes`); if (pack.priceDragon > 0) prices.push(`${pack.priceDragon} Aliento`); return `
${pack.name}
📋 ID: ${pack.id} (úsalo en el Pase de Batalla)
Precio: ${prices.join(' + ') || 'Gratis'}
Recompensas: ${pack.rewards.length} items
`; }).join(''); } function deletePack(index) { if (!confirm('¿Eliminar este sobre?')) return; allPacks.splice(index, 1); debouncedSave(); loadPacksList(); loadPacks(); } function createCode() { let codeText = document.getElementById('code-text').value.trim().toUpperCase(); const gold = parseInt(document.getElementById('code-gold').value) || 0; const diamonds = parseInt(document.getElementById('code-diamond').value) || 0; const dragonBreath = parseInt(document.getElementById('code-dragon').value) || 0; const eventCoins = parseInt(document.getElementById('code-eventcoins')?.value) || 0; const maxUses = parseInt(document.getElementById('code-max-uses').value) || 0; if (!codeText) { // Generar código aleatorio codeText = 'CODE-' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 8).toUpperCase(); } if (allCodes.find(c => c.code === codeText)) { alert('Este código ya existe'); return; } if (gold === 0 && diamonds === 0 && dragonBreath === 0 && eventCoins === 0) { alert('El código debe tener al menos una recompensa'); return; } const code = { code: codeText, gold: gold, diamonds: diamonds, dragonBreath: dragonBreath, eventCoins: eventCoins, maxUses: maxUses, uses: 0 }; allCodes.push(code); debouncedSave(); alert(`¡Código creado!\n${codeText}`); // Limpiar formulario document.getElementById('code-text').value = ''; document.getElementById('code-gold').value = ''; document.getElementById('code-diamond').value = ''; document.getElementById('code-dragon').value = ''; const evEl = document.getElementById('code-eventcoins'); if (evEl) evEl.value = ''; document.getElementById('code-max-uses').value = ''; loadCodesList(); } function loadCodesList() { const container = document.getElementById('codes-list'); if (allCodes.length === 0) { container.innerHTML = '

No hay códigos creados

'; return; } container.innerHTML = '

Códigos Creados

' + allCodes.map((code, index) => `
${code.code}
${code.gold > 0 ? `
Oro: ${code.gold}
` : ''} ${code.diamonds > 0 ? `
Diamantes: ${code.diamonds}
` : ''} ${code.dragonBreath > 0 ? `
Aliento de Dragón: ${code.dragonBreath}
` : ''} ${code.eventCoins > 0 ? `
🪙 Moneda Evento: ${code.eventCoins}
` : ''}
Usos: ${code.uses}${code.maxUses > 0 ? ` / ${code.maxUses}` : ' (Ilimitado)'}
`).join(''); } function deleteCode(index) { if (!confirm('¿Eliminar este código?')) return; allCodes.splice(index, 1); debouncedSave(); loadCodesList(); } function loadManageItems() { const grid = document.getElementById('manage-items-grid'); if (allItems.length === 0) { grid.innerHTML = '

No hay items creados aún

'; return; } grid.innerHTML = allItems.map(item => { const rarityDisplayName = rarityNames[item.rarity] || item.rarity; return `
ID: ${item.id}
${item.name}
${rarityDisplayName}
❤️ ${item.health || 0} | ⚔️ ${item.damage || 0}
${item.type ? '📦 ' + item.type.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + item.type.slice(1) : ''}
`; }).join(''); } function getColorForRarity(rarity) { const colors = { 'comun': '#6c757d', 'raro': '#0077b6', 'super-raro': '#00b4d8', 'mega-raro': '#0096c7', 'epico': '#a100f2', 'ultra-epico': '#c77dff', 'mega-ultra-epico': '#e0aaff', 'mitico': '#ff006e', 'ultra-mitico': '#ff4d8f', 'mega-mitico': '#ff8ab0', 'legendario': '#ff5400', 'ultra-legendario': '#ff7b00', 'mega-legendario': '#ffa200', 'cromo': '#ffd000', 'ultra-cromo': '#ffea00', 'exclusivo': '#00ff88', 'ultra-exclusivo': '#00ffcc', 'cromo-exclusivo': '#00fff2', 'guardian': '#8b00ff', 'meca': '#c0c0c0', 'luna': '#b8c5d6', 'marte': '#cd5c5c', 'sol': '#ffcc00', 'jupiter': '#daa520', 'ultra-jupiter': '#f4a460' }; return colors[rarity] || '#ffffff'; } function toggleItemVisibility(itemId) { const item = allItems.find(i => i.id === itemId); if (!item) return; item.hidden = !item.hidden; debouncedSave(); loadManageItems(); loadShop(); } function editItem(itemId) { const item = allItems.find(i => i.id === itemId); if (!item) { alert('Item no encontrado'); return; } // Crear modal de edición const modal = document.createElement('div'); modal.className = 'modal active'; modal.innerHTML = `

Editar Item: ${item.name}

⚙️ Opciones de Tienda
`; document.body.appendChild(modal); } function saveItemEdit(itemId) { const item = allItems.find(i => i.id === itemId); if (!item) return; item.name = document.getElementById('edit-item-name').value.trim() || item.name; item.image = document.getElementById('edit-item-image').value.trim() || item.image; item.health = parseInt(document.getElementById('edit-item-health').value) || 0; item.damage = parseInt(document.getElementById('edit-item-damage').value) || 0; item.priceGold = parseInt(document.getElementById('edit-item-price-gold').value) || 0; item.priceDiamond = parseInt(document.getElementById('edit-item-price-diamond').value) || 0; item.priceDragon = parseInt(document.getElementById('edit-item-price-dragon').value) || 0; item.priceJupiter = parseInt((document.getElementById('edit-item-price-jupiter')||{}).value) || 0; const newDestacado = !!(document.getElementById('edit-item-destacado')||{}).checked; if (newDestacado) allItems.forEach(i => { i.destacado = false; }); // solo uno item.destacado = newDestacado; item.rotacionDiaria = !!(document.getElementById('edit-item-rotacion')||{}).checked; item.oferta = !!(document.getElementById('edit-item-oferta')||{}).checked; item.descuento = parseInt((document.getElementById('edit-item-descuento')||{}).value) || 0; item.nivelRequerido = parseInt((document.getElementById('edit-item-nivel')||{}).value) || 0; item.copasRequeridas = parseInt((document.getElementById('edit-item-copas')||{}).value) || 0; debouncedSave(); loadManageItems(); loadShop(); showToast('Item actualizado exitosamente', 'success'); } function deleteItem(itemId) { if (!confirm('¿Eliminar este item permanentemente?')) return; const index = allItems.findIndex(i => i.id === itemId); if (index > -1) { allItems.splice(index, 1); debouncedSave(); loadManageItems(); // PERF: Invalidar tabs que dependen del listado de items _adminTabLoaded.delete('create-item'); _adminTabLoaded.delete('create-pack'); _adminTabLoaded.delete('create-box'); loadShop(); } } function loadAccounts() { const container = document.getElementById('accounts-list'); document.getElementById('accounts-count').textContent = users.length; if (users.length === 0) { container.innerHTML = '

No hay cuentas registradas

'; return; } container.innerHTML = users.map(user => `
${user.username} ${user.username === 'admin' ? '' : ''}
${user.username !== 'admin' ? ` ` : ''}
Rango
${user.rank}
Copas
${user.cups}
Oro
${user.gold}
Diamantes
${user.diamonds}
Aliento de Dragón
${user.dragonBreath}
Items
${(user.inventory || []).length}
Enemigos Derrotados
${user.enemiesDefeated}
Vida Total
${user.totalHealth}
Daño Total
${user.totalDamage}
`).join(''); } function toggleBlockUser(username) { const user = users.find(u => u.username === username); if (!user) return; if (user.username === 'admin') { alert('No puedes bloquear al administrador'); return; } user.blocked = !user.blocked; debouncedSave(); loadAccounts(); alert(`Usuario ${user.blocked ? 'bloqueado' : 'desbloqueado'}`); } function createRank() { const name = document.getElementById('rank-name').value.trim(); const image = document.getElementById('rank-image').value.trim(); const cupsRequired = parseInt(document.getElementById('rank-cups-required').value) || 0; const rewardGold = parseInt(document.getElementById('rank-reward-gold').value) || 0; const rewardDiamonds = parseInt(document.getElementById('rank-reward-diamonds').value) || 0; const rewardDragonBreath = parseInt(document.getElementById('rank-reward-dragon').value) || 0; if (!name) { alert('Por favor ingresa un nombre para el rango'); return; } if (cupsRequired <= 0) { alert('Las copas requeridas deben ser mayor a 0'); return; } if (rewardGold === 0 && rewardDiamonds === 0 && rewardDragonBreath === 0) { alert('El rango debe tener al menos una recompensa'); return; } // Verificar si ya existe un rango con esas copas if (allRanks.find(r => r.cupsRequired === cupsRequired)) { alert('Ya existe un rango con esa cantidad de copas requeridas'); return; } const rank = { id: Date.now(), name: name, image: image || 'https://via.placeholder.com/120?text=Rango', cupsRequired: cupsRequired, rewardGold: rewardGold, rewardDiamonds: rewardDiamonds, rewardDragonBreath: rewardDragonBreath }; allRanks.push(rank); debouncedSave(); alert('¡Rango creado exitosamente!'); // Limpiar formulario document.getElementById('rank-name').value = ''; document.getElementById('rank-image').value = ''; document.getElementById('rank-cups-required').value = ''; document.getElementById('rank-reward-gold').value = '0'; document.getElementById('rank-reward-diamonds').value = '0'; document.getElementById('rank-reward-dragon').value = '0'; loadRanksListAdmin(); } function loadRanksListAdmin() { const container = document.getElementById('ranks-list-admin'); if (allRanks.length === 0) { container.innerHTML = '

Rangos Creados

No hay rangos creados

'; return; } // Ordenar por copas requeridas const sortedRanks = [...allRanks].sort((a, b) => a.cupsRequired - b.cupsRequired); container.innerHTML = '

Rangos Creados

' + sortedRanks.map((rank, index) => `
${rank.name}
Copas: ${rank.cupsRequired}
${rank.rewardGold > 0 ? `
Oro: ${rank.rewardGold}
` : ''} ${rank.rewardDiamonds > 0 ? `
Diamantes: ${rank.rewardDiamonds}
` : ''} ${rank.rewardDragonBreath > 0 ? `
Aliento: ${rank.rewardDragonBreath}
` : ''}
`).join(''); } function deleteRank(index) { if (!confirm('¿Eliminar este rango?')) return; allRanks.splice(index, 1); debouncedSave(); loadRanksListAdmin(); } // ── Legacy v35 (mantenido para compatibilidad) ─────────────── function exportGameDataLegacy() { try { if (currentUser) { currentUser._savedAt = Date.now(); const idx = users.findIndex(u => u.username === currentUser.username); if (idx !== -1) users[idx] = currentUser; } const slimUsers = users.map(u => { const slimU = _slimUserForExport(u, allItems); return { username: slimU.username, password: slimU.password, email: slimU.email || '', isAdmin: slimU.isAdmin || false, isBanned: slimU.isBanned || false, createdAt: slimU.createdAt || Date.now(), tutorialCompleted: slimU.tutorialCompleted || false, cups: slimU.cups || 0, gold: slimU.gold || 0, diamonds: slimU.diamonds || 0, dragonBreath: slimU.dragonBreath || 0, jupiterStars: slimU.jupiterStars || 0, eventCoins: slimU.eventCoins || 0, energy: slimU.energy || 0,
