maxEnergy: slimU.maxEnergy || 100, lastEnergyUpdate: slimU.lastEnergyUpdate || null, level: slimU.level || 1, xp: slimU.xp || 0, hp: slimU.hp || 100, maxHp: slimU.maxHp || 100, attack: slimU.attack || 10, defense: slimU.defense || 5, speed: slimU.speed || 10, totalDamage: slimU.totalDamage || 0, totalHealth: slimU.totalHealth || 0, rank: slimU.rank || '', rankPoints: slimU.rankPoints || 0, inventory: slimU.inventory || [], equippedItems: slimU.equippedItems || {}, equipment: slimU.equipment || {}, purchasedWorlds: slimU.purchasedWorlds || [], completedLevels: slimU.completedLevels || [], unlockedWorlds: slimU.unlockedWorlds || [], completedWorlds: slimU.completedWorlds || [], completedBattles: slimU.completedBattles || [], defeatedBosses: slimU.defeatedBosses || [], worldProgress: slimU.worldProgress || {}, completedMissions: slimU.completedMissions || [], activeMissions: slimU.activeMissions || [], missionProgress: slimU.missionProgress || {}, battlePass: slimU.battlePass || { currentLevel:1, currentXP:0, hasPremium:false, claimedRewards:{free:[],premium:[]} }, eventData: slimU.eventData || { xp:0, battlePassLevel:1, hasPremium:false, claimedRewards:{free:[],premium:[]} }, redeemedCodes: slimU.redeemedCodes || [], openedPacks: slimU.openedPacks || [], rechargeHistory: slimU.rechargeHistory || {}, stats: slimU.stats || {}, achievements: slimU.achievements || [], upgradeSlots: slimU.upgradeSlots || {}, neonSlots: slimU.neonSlots || {}, settings: slimU.settings || {}, _savedAt: slimU._savedAt || Date.now() }; }); const gameData = { version: '4.1', saveFormat: 'slim_refs', saveVersion: 35, exportDate: new Date().toISOString(), exportedBy: currentUser ? currentUser.username : 'admin', users: slimUsers, items: allItems, worlds: allWorlds, packs: allPacks, codes: allCodes, enemies: allEnemies, bosses: allBosses, ranks: allRanks, missions, boxes: allBoxes, banks: allBanks, wallets: allWallets, rechargePackages: allRechargePackages, rechargeOrders: allRechargeOrders, battlePassConfig, shopRotation, shopSlots: allShopSlots, shopSections: shopSlots }; const dataStr = JSON.stringify(gameData); const dataBlob = new Blob([dataStr], { type: 'application/json;charset=utf-8' }); const url = URL.createObjectURL(dataBlob); const link = document.createElement('a'); link.href = url; const fecha = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g,'-').substring(0,19); link.download = `EpicQuest_BACKUP_v35_${fecha}.json`; document.body.appendChild(link); link.click(); document.body.removeChild(link); setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 5000); const sizeKB = (dataBlob.size / 1024).toFixed(1); showToast(`✅ Exportado legacy v35 (${sizeKB} KB) — ${users.length} jugadores`, 'success'); } catch (error) { console.error('Error al exportar:', error); showToast('Error al exportar: ' + error.message, 'error'); } } /** * v40: Exporta TODO el juego con optimización máxima (ultra_optimized). * Reduce el tamaño del backup hasta un 90% respecto a versiones anteriores. */ function exportGameData() { try { if (currentUser) { currentUser._savedAt = Date.now(); const idx = users.findIndex(u => u.username === currentUser.username); if (idx !== -1) users[idx] = currentUser; } const optimizedState = _optimizeFullState(); const jsonString = JSON.stringify(optimizedState, null, 2); const blob = new Blob([jsonString], { type: 'application/json' }); const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); const link = document.createElement('a'); link.href = url; const fecha = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g,'-').substring(0,19); link.download = `EpicQuest_BACKUP_v45_${fecha}.json`; document.body.appendChild(link); link.click(); document.body.removeChild(link); setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 5000); // Calcular estadísticas de reducción let reduction = 'N/A'; try { const rawSize = JSON.stringify(_buildCurrentState()).length; const optSize = jsonString.length; reduction = ((1 - optSize / rawSize) * 100).toFixed(1) + '%'; } catch(e) {} const totalShopSlots = Object.values(shopSlots).reduce((s,arr)=>s+(Array.isArray(arr)?arr.length:0),0); const sizeKB = (blob.size / 1024).toFixed(1); showToast( `✅ Exportado OPTIMIZADO v45 (${sizeKB} KB)\n` + `📉 Reducción: ${reduction}\n` + `👥 Usuarios: ${optimizedState.stats.originalUsers} · ` + `🎒 Items inventario: ${optimizedState.stats.totalInventoryItems} · ` + `🛒 Slots tienda: ${totalShopSlots}`, 'success' ); console.log('📊 Stats optimización:', optimizedState.stats); } catch (error) { console.error('Error al exportar:', error); showToast('Error al exportar: ' + error.message, 'error'); } } /** * v45: Exporta SOLO el catálogo del juego (items, mundos, packs, etc.) * SIN datos de jugadores. Ideal para compartir la configuración del juego * entre instancias o como backup del catálogo independiente de los jugadores. */ function exportCatalogOnly() { try { const catalog = buildCatalogPayload(); const jsonString = JSON.stringify(catalog, null, 2); const blob = new Blob([jsonString], { type: 'application/json' }); const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); const link = document.createElement('a'); link.href = url; const fecha = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, '-').substring(0, 19); link.download = `EpicQuest_CATALOGO_v${CATALOG_SAVE_VERSION}_${fecha}.json`; document.body.appendChild(link); link.click(); document.body.removeChild(link); setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 5000); const sizeKB = (blob.size / 1024).toFixed(1); showToast( `📚 Catálogo exportado (${sizeKB} KB)\n` + `🗡️ Items: ${allItems.length} · 🌍 Mundos: ${allWorlds.length} · ` + `📦 Packs: ${allPacks.length} · 👾 Enemigos: ${allEnemies.length}`, 'success' ); } catch (e) { console.error('[exportCatalogOnly] Error:', e); showToast('Error al exportar catálogo: ' + e.message, 'error'); } } /** * v40: Exporta ÚNICAMENTE el perfil del jugador actual (optimizado). */ function exportMyProfile() { if (!currentUser) { showToast('Debes iniciar sesión para exportar tu perfil', 'error'); return; } try { currentUser._savedAt = Date.now(); // v45: Usar _buildPlayerPayload para garantizar separación catálogo/jugador const playerPayload = _buildPlayerPayload(currentUser); const profileData = { version: '4.3', saveFormat: 'player_profile_optimized', saveVersion: PLAYER_SAVE_VERSION, exportDate: new Date().toISOString(), player: playerPayload, // Incluir solo refs del catálogo (items optimizados) para poder rehidratar el inventario items: allItems.map(_optimizeCatalogItem).filter(Boolean) }; const jsonString = JSON.stringify(profileData, null, 2); const dataBlob = new Blob([jsonString], { type: 'application/json' }); const url = URL.createObjectURL(dataBlob); const link = document.createElement('a'); link.href = url; const fecha = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g,'-').substring(0,19); link.download = `EpicQuest_Perfil_${currentUser.username}_v${PLAYER_SAVE_VERSION}_${fecha}.json`; document.body.appendChild(link); link.click(); document.body.removeChild(link); setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 5000); const sizeKB = (dataBlob.size / 1024).toFixed(1); showToast(`✅ Perfil exportado v${PLAYER_SAVE_VERSION} (${sizeKB} KB) — Guarda este archivo para restaurar en otro dispositivo`, 'success'); } catch(e) { console.error('Error exportando perfil:', e); showToast('Error al exportar perfil: ' + e.message, 'error'); } } /** Legacy: exportar perfil en formato antiguo */ function exportMyProfileLegacy() { if (!currentUser) { showToast('Debes iniciar sesión para exportar tu perfil', 'error'); return; } try { currentUser._savedAt = Date.now(); const slimU = _slimUserForExport(currentUser, allItems); const profileData = { version: '4.1', saveFormat: 'player_profile', saveVersion: 35, exportDate: new Date().toISOString(), player: slimU, items: allItems }; const dataStr = JSON.stringify(profileData); const dataBlob = new Blob([dataStr], { type: 'application/json;charset=utf-8' }); const url = URL.createObjectURL(dataBlob); const link = document.createElement('a'); link.href = url; const fecha = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g,'-').substring(0,19); link.download = `EpicQuest_Perfil_legacy_${currentUser.username}_${fecha}.json`; document.body.appendChild(link); link.click(); document.body.removeChild(link); setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 5000); showToast(`✅ Perfil legacy exportado (${(dataBlob.size/1024).toFixed(1)} KB)`, 'success'); } catch(e) { showToast('Error: ' + e.message, 'error'); } } /** * v35: Importa un perfil de jugador individual. * Si el jugador ya existe, actualiza sus datos. * Si no existe, lo crea. */ function importMyProfile() { const input = document.createElement('input'); input.type = 'file'; input.accept = '.json'; input.onchange = function(e) { const file = e.target.files[0]; if (!file) return; if (!confirm('⚠️ Esto reemplazará los datos de tu cuenta con los del archivo seleccionado.\n\n¿Continuar?')) return; showToast('⏳ Importando perfil...', 'info'); const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = function(ev) { _parseJSONAsync(ev.target.result).then(function(d) { try { // Detectar formato: player_profile / player_profile_optimized (exportado por exportMyProfile) // o full backup (exportado por exportGameData) let playerRaw = null; let itemsDb = allItems; const isOptimizedProfile = (d.saveFormat === 'player_profile_optimized'); if ((d.saveFormat === 'player_profile' || d.saveFormat === 'player_profile_optimized') && d.player) { const catalogItems = (Array.isArray(d.items) && d.items.length > 0) ? d.items : allItems; playerRaw = isOptimizedProfile ? _rebuildUser(d.player, catalogItems) : d.player; itemsDb = catalogItems; } else if (Array.isArray(d.users)) { // Buscar el usuario actual en un backup completo if (!currentUser) throw new Error('Debes iniciar sesión para importar desde un backup completo'); playerRaw = d.users.find(u => u.username === currentUser.username); if (!playerRaw) throw new Error(`Usuario "${currentUser.username}" no encontrado en el archivo`); if (Array.isArray(d.items) && d.items.length > 0) itemsDb = d.items; } else { throw new Error('Formato de archivo no reconocido'); } // Hidratar inventario const toHydrate = [playerRaw]; _hydrateUsersAsync(toHydrate, itemsDb).then(function(hydrated) { const importedUser = hydrated[0]; // v45: Migrar al esquema actual ANTES de validar const migrated = _migratePlayerData(Utils.deepClone(importedUser)); const validated = StorageManager.validateUserData(migrated); if (!validated) throw new Error('Datos del perfil inválidos'); // Insertar/actualizar en el array de usuarios const idx = users.findIndex(u => u.username === validated.username); if (idx !== -1) { StorageManager.mergeSafeLoad(users[idx], validated); if (currentUser && currentUser.username === validated.username) { StorageManager.mergeSafeLoad(currentUser, validated); } } else { users.push(UserManager.normalizeUser(validated)); } debouncedSave(); updateUI(); showToast(`✅ Perfil de "${validated.username}" importado correctamente`, 'success'); }).catch(e => showToast('❌ Error hidratando inventario: ' + e.message, 'error')); } catch(err) { showToast('❌ ' + err.message, 'error'); } }).catch(e => showToast('❌ Archivo JSON inválido: ' + e.message, 'error')); }; reader.readAsText(file); }; input.click(); } // ── Web Worker inline para parsear JSON sin bloquear el hilo principal ── function _parseJSONAsync(text) { return new Promise((resolve, reject) => { // Intentar con Web Worker para no bloquear el hilo try { const workerCode = ` self.onmessage = function(e) { try { const data = JSON.parse(e.data); self.postMessage({ ok: true, data: data }); } catch(err) { self.postMessage({ ok: false, error: err.message }); } }; `; const blob = new Blob([workerCode], { type: 'application/javascript' }); const workerUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob); const worker = new Worker(workerUrl); worker.onmessage = function(e) { URL.revokeObjectURL(workerUrl); worker.terminate(); if (e.data.ok) resolve(e.data.data); else reject(new Error(e.data.error)); }; worker.onerror = function(err) { URL.revokeObjectURL(workerUrl); worker.terminate(); // Fallback síncrono si falla el worker try { resolve(JSON.parse(text)); } catch(e2) { reject(e2); } }; worker.postMessage(text); } catch(workerErr) { // Fallback: parse normal en caso de que el navegador no soporte workers try { resolve(JSON.parse(text)); } catch(e2) { reject(e2); } } }); } function importGameData() { const fileInput = document.getElementById('import-file-input'); const file = fileInput.files[0]; if (!file) { showToast('Por favor selecciona un archivo', 'error'); return; } if (!confirm('⚠️ Esto reemplazará TODOS los datos actuales (jugadores, items, mundos, misiones, cajas, bancos, pase de batalla, etc.).\n\n¿Continuar?')) return; // Mostrar indicador de carga para que el usuario sepa que está procesando showToast('⏳ Procesando archivo, un momento...', 'info'); const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = function(e) { const rawText = e.target.result; // Parsear en Web Worker → no congela el hilo principal _parseJSONAsync(rawText).then(function(d) { try { if (!d.users || !Array.isArray(d.users)) throw new Error('Formato inválido: falta el array de usuarios'); // ── Paso 1: cargar catálogo PRIMERO (allItems debe estar listo antes de hidratar) ── allItems = d.items || []; allWorlds = d.worlds || []; allPacks = d.packs || []; allCodes = d.codes || []; allEnemies = d.enemies || []; allBosses = d.bosses || []; allRanks = d.ranks || []; missions = d.missions || []; allBoxes = d.boxes || []; allBanks = d.banks || []; allWallets = d.wallets || []; allRechargePackages = d.rechargePackages || []; allRechargeOrders = d.rechargeOrders || []; allShopSlots = d.shopSlots || []; if (d.shopSections && typeof d.shopSections === 'object') { ['featured','offers','items','packs','armas','armaduras','pociones','mascotas'].forEach(k => { if (Array.isArray(d.shopSections[k])) shopSlots[k] = d.shopSections[k]; }); } if (d.shopRotation && typeof d.shopRotation === 'object') { shopRotation = Object.assign({ lastDate: '', ids: [] }, d.shopRotation); } if (d.battlePassConfig && d.battlePassConfig.levels) battlePassConfig = d.battlePassConfig; // ── Paso 2: detectar formato e hidratar/reconstruir usuarios ── const isUltraOptimized = d.saveFormat === 'ultra_optimized'; const isSlimFormat = isUltraOptimized || d.saveFormat === 'slim_refs' || (d.version && parseFloat(d.version) >= 4); const rawUsers = d.users || []; showToast('⏳ Procesando inventarios... Un momento', 'info'); // Formato ultra_optimized (v40): reconstrucción directa, más rápida const hydratePromise = isUltraOptimized ? Promise.resolve(rawUsers.map(u => _rebuildUser(u, allItems)).filter(Boolean)) : isSlimFormat ? _hydrateUsersAsync(rawUsers, allItems) // formato v4 slim_refs : Promise.resolve(rawUsers); // formato legacy hydratePromise.then(function(hydratedUsers) { // v45: Migrar + validar + normalizar cada usuario importado // La migración garantiza que saves viejos (v35, v40, v44) sean // compatibles con el esquema actual sin romper nada existente. users = hydratedUsers.map(rawU => { const migrated = _migratePlayerData(Utils.deepClone(rawU)); const validated = StorageManager.validateUserData(migrated); return validated ? UserManager.normalizeUser(validated) : null; }).filter(Boolean); // Sincronizar currentUser si sigue logueado if (currentUser) { const refreshed = users.find(u => u.username === currentUser.username); if (refreshed) currentUser = refreshed; } debouncedSave(); fileInput.value = ''; // ── Refrescar tienda y panel admin tras importar ── // 1. Invalidar cache de lazy-load para que el tab tienda re-renderice if (typeof _adminTabLoaded !== 'undefined') _adminTabLoaded.delete('tienda'); // 2. Refrescar vista de tienda (jugador) try { loadShopSlots(); } catch(e) {} // 3. Refrescar panel admin de tienda si ya está visible try { if (typeof renderAdminTiendaSlots === 'function') renderAdminTiendaSlots(); } catch(e) {} const totalInv = users.reduce((s,u)=>s+(u.inventory||[]).length, 0); const totalShopSlots = Object.values(shopSlots).reduce((s,arr)=>s+(Array.isArray(arr)?arr.length:0), 0); showToast( `✅ Importado ${isUltraOptimized?'v45 optimizado':isSlimFormat?'v4 slim':'legacy'} — 👥${users.length} jugadores · 🎒${totalInv} items inv · 🗡️${allItems.length} catálogo · 🌍${allWorlds.length} mundos · 📦${allBoxes.length} cajas · 🛒${totalShopSlots} slots tienda`, 'success' ); setTimeout(() => alert('✅ Datos importados correctamente.\n\nCierra sesión y vuelve a iniciar sesión para ver todos los cambios.'), 800); }).catch(function(hydrErr) { console.error('Error hidratando usuarios:', hydrErr); // Fallback: usar usuarios sin hidratar (datos completos si son legacy) users = rawUsers; debouncedSave(); showToast('⚠️ Importado con advertencias (hidratación parcial): ' + hydrErr.message, 'error'); }); } catch (error) { console.error('Error al importar:', error); showToast('❌ Error al importar: ' + error.message, 'error'); } }).catch(function(error) { console.error('Error al parsear JSON:', error); showToast('❌ Error al leer el archivo JSON: ' + error.message, 'error'); }); }; reader.onerror = () => showToast('Error al leer el archivo', 'error'); reader.readAsText(file); } // ============================================ // SISTEMA DE CAJAS // ============================================ const BOX_RARITIES = [ { key:'raro', label:'🔵 RARO', color:'#0077b6', bar:'linear-gradient(90deg,#0077b6,#00b4d8)' }, { key:'ultra-raro', label:'💠 ULTRA RARO', color:'#00b4d8', bar:'linear-gradient(90deg,#00b4d8,#48cae4)' }, { key:'epico', label:'🟣 ÉPICO', color:'#a100f2', bar:'linear-gradient(90deg,#a100f2,#c77dff)' }, { key:'mitico', label:'🔴 MÍTICO', color:'#ff006e', bar:'linear-gradient(90deg,#ff006e,#ff4d8f)' }, { key:'legendario', label:'🔶 LEGENDARIO', color:'#ff5400', bar:'linear-gradient(90deg,#ff5400,#ff7b00)' }, { key:'ultra-legendario', label:'⭐ ULTRA LEGENDARIO', color:'#ffd700', bar:'linear-gradient(90deg,#ffd700,#fff176)' }, ]; /* ---- helpers ---- */ function _gv(id){ const e=document.getElementById(id); return e?e.value:null; } /* ---- helper: leer lista de items de una rareza ---- */ function _getItemsForRarity(key){ const list = document.getElementById(`box-${key}-items-list`); if(!list) return []; const items = []; list.querySelectorAll('.item-row').forEach(row => { const idVal = (row.querySelector('.item-id-input')?.value||'').trim(); const chance = parseFloat(row.querySelector('.item-chance-input')?.value)||0; if(idVal && chance > 0) items.push({ itemId: idVal, chance }); }); return items; } /* ---- añadir fila de item a una rareza (UI dinámica) ---- */ function addItemToRarity(key, color){ const list = document.getElementById(`box-${key}-items-list`); if(!list) return; const row = document.createElement('div'); row.className='item-row'; row.style.cssText='display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;'; row.innerHTML=` % `; list.appendChild(row); } /* ---- crear / guardar caja (admin) ---- */ function createBox(){ const name = (_gv('box-name')||'').trim(); const image = (_gv('box-image')||'').trim(); if(!name){ showToast('Ingresa un nombre para la caja','error'); return; } const rarities={}; for(const r of BOX_RARITIES){ const k=r.key; rarities[k]={ chance: parseFloat(_gv(`box-${k}-chance`))||0, gold: parseInt(_gv(`box-${k}-gold`))||0, diamond: parseInt(_gv(`box-${k}-diamond`))||0, dragon: parseInt(_gv(`box-${k}-dragon`))||0, energy: parseInt(_gv(`box-${k}-energy`))||0, jupiter: parseInt(_gv(`box-${k}-jupiter`))||0, eventCoins: parseInt(_gv(`box-${k}-eventcoins`))||0, items: _getItemsForRarity(k), }; } const total = Object.values(rarities).reduce((s,r)=>s+r.chance,0); if(total<=0){ showToast('Las probabilidades deben sumar más de 0','error'); return; } if(_editingBoxIdx >= 0 && allBoxes[_editingBoxIdx]){ /* MODO EDICIÓN — conservar id y hidden */ const existingBox = allBoxes[_editingBoxIdx]; allBoxes[_editingBoxIdx] = { ...existingBox, name, image: image||existingBox.image||'https://via.placeholder.com/250?text=Caja', priceGold: parseInt(_gv('box-price-gold'))||0, priceDiamond: parseInt(_gv('box-price-diamond'))||0, priceJupiter: parseInt(_gv('box-price-jupiter'))||0, rarities }; debouncedSave(); showToast(`✅ Caja "${name}" actualizada`, 'success'); _cancelEditBox(); } else { allBoxes.push({ id: Date.now(), name, image: image||'https://via.placeholder.com/250?text=Caja', priceGold: parseInt(_gv('box-price-gold'))||0, priceDiamond: parseInt(_gv('box-price-diamond'))||0, priceJupiter: parseInt(_gv('box-price-jupiter'))||0, rarities }); debouncedSave(); showToast('¡Caja creada! 🎁','success'); } /* limpiar form */ ['box-name','box-image'].forEach(id=>{ const e=document.getElementById(id); if(e)e.value=''; }); ['box-price-gold','box-price-diamond','box-price-jupiter'].forEach(id=>{ const e=document.getElementById(id); if(e)e.value='0'; }); const defs={ raro:[50,100], 'ultra-raro':[25,300], epico:[15,600], mitico:[7,1500], legendario:[2.5,3000], 'ultra-legendario':[0.5,10000] }; for(const r of BOX_RARITIES){ const k=r.key, d=defs[k]||[0,0]; [['chance',d[0]],['gold',d[1]],['diamond',0],['dragon',0],['energy',0],['jupiter',0],['eventcoins',0]].forEach(([s,v])=>{ const e=document.getElementById(`box-${k}-${s}`); if(e)e.value=v; }); /* limpiar lista de items */ const itemsList=document.getElementById(`box-${k}-items-list`); if(itemsList) itemsList.innerHTML=''; } loadBoxesListAdmin(); } /* ---- lista admin ---- */ let _editingBoxIdx = -1; function loadBoxesListAdmin(){ const c=document.getElementById('boxes-list-admin'); if(!c)return; if(allBoxes.length===0){ c.innerHTML='

Cajas Creadas

No hay cajas aún

'; return; } c.innerHTML='

Cajas Creadas

'+allBoxes.map((box,idx)=>{ const p=[]; if(box.priceGold>0) p.push(`💰 ${box.priceGold}`); if(box.priceDiamond>0) p.push(`💎 ${box.priceDiamond}`); if(box.priceJupiter>0) p.push(`⭐ ${box.priceJupiter}`); const isHidden = !!box.hidden; return `
${box.name} ${isHidden ? `🚫 Oculta` : ''}
ID: ${box.id}
${p.join(' ')|| 'Gratis'}
`; }).join(''); } function toggleBoxHidden(idx){ allBoxes[idx].hidden = !allBoxes[idx].hidden; debouncedSave(); loadBoxesListAdmin(); loadBoxesShop(); showToast(allBoxes[idx].hidden ? '🚫 Caja ocultada de la tienda' : '👁 Caja visible en la tienda', 'info'); } function editBox(idx){ const box = allBoxes[idx]; if(!box) return; _editingBoxIdx = idx; /* Scroll al formulario */ const form = document.getElementById('admin-create-box'); if(form) form.scrollIntoView({ behavior:'smooth', block:'start' }); /* Rellenar campos básicos */ const setV = (id, val) => { const e=document.getElementById(id); if(e) e.value=val||''; }; setV('box-name', box.name); setV('box-image', box.image||''); setV('box-price-gold', box.priceGold||0); setV('box-price-diamond', box.priceDiamond||0); setV('box-price-jupiter', box.priceJupiter||0); /* Rellenar rarezas */ const BOX_RARITY_COLORS = { 'raro':'#0077b6','ultra-raro':'#00b4d8','epico':'#a100f2', 'mitico':'#ff006e','legendario':'#ff5400','ultra-legendario':'#ffd700' }; for(const r of BOX_RARITIES){ const k = r.key; const rd = (box.rarities && box.rarities[k]) || {}; setV(`box-${k}-chance`, rd.chance||0); setV(`box-${k}-gold`, rd.gold||0); setV(`box-${k}-diamond`, rd.diamond||0); setV(`box-${k}-dragon`, rd.dragon||0); setV(`box-${k}-energy`, rd.energy||0); setV(`box-${k}-jupiter`, rd.jupiter||0); setV(`box-${k}-eventcoins`, rd.eventCoins||0); /* Limpiar y recrear items */ const itemsList = document.getElementById(`box-${k}-items-list`); if(itemsList){ itemsList.innerHTML=''; if(rd.items && rd.items.length > 0){ rd.items.forEach(entry => { const color = BOX_RARITY_COLORS[k] || '#aaa'; const row = document.createElement('div'); row.className='item-row'; row.style.cssText='display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;'; row.innerHTML=` % `; itemsList.appendChild(row); }); } } } /* Cambiar título y botón */ const title = form.querySelector('h3'); if(title) title.innerHTML = `✏️ Editando Caja: ${box.name}`; const btn = form.querySelector('.submit-btn'); if(btn){ btn.innerHTML=' GUARDAR CAMBIOS'; btn.style.background='linear-gradient(45deg,#2d6a4f,#52b788)'; } showToast(`Editando: ${box.name}`, 'info'); } function deleteBox(idx){ if(!confirm('¿Eliminar esta caja?'))return; if(_editingBoxIdx === idx){ _cancelEditBox(); } else if(_editingBoxIdx > idx){ _editingBoxIdx--; } allBoxes.splice(idx,1); debouncedSave(); loadBoxesListAdmin(); loadBoxesShop(); } function _cancelEditBox(){ _editingBoxIdx = -1; const form = document.getElementById('admin-create-box'); if(!form) return; const title = form.querySelector('h3'); if(title) title.innerHTML = '🎁 Crear Nueva Caja'; const btn = form.querySelector('.submit-btn'); if(btn){ btn.innerHTML=' CREAR CAJA'; btn.style.background=''; } } /* ---- tienda de cajas ---- */ function loadBoxesShop(){ const c = document.getElementById('cajas-shop-container'); if (!c) return; const visibleBoxes = allBoxes.filter(b => !b.hidden); if (visibleBoxes.length === 0) { c.innerHTML = '

No hay cajas disponibles todavía

'; return; } c.innerHTML = '
' + visibleBoxes.map(box => { const p = []; if (box.priceGold > 0) p.push(` ${box.priceGold}`); if (box.priceDiamond > 0) p.push(` ${box.priceDiamond}`); if (box.priceJupiter > 0) p.push(` ${box.priceJupiter}`); const sum = BOX_RARITIES.map(r => { const rd = box.rarities && box.rarities[r.key]; if (!rd || rd.chance <= 0) return ''; return `${r.label}: ${rd.chance}%`; }).filter(Boolean).join('
'); return `
${box.name}
${sum}
${p.join(' ')}
`; }).join('') + '
'; } /* ---- lanzar apertura ---- */ function abrirCaja(boxId){ if(!currentUser){ showToast('Inicia sesión para abrir cajas','error'); return; } /* buscar caja por id (compatibilidad número o string) */ const box=allBoxes.find(b=>String(b.id)===String(boxId)); if(!box){ showToast('Caja no encontrada','error'); return; } /* cobrar */ if(box.priceGold>0 && (currentUser.gold||0)0 && (currentUser.diamonds||0)0 && (currentUser.jupiterStars||0)0) currentUser.gold=(currentUser.gold||0)-box.priceGold; if(box.priceDiamond>0) currentUser.diamonds=(currentUser.diamonds||0)-box.priceDiamond; if(box.priceJupiter>0) currentUser.jupiterStars=(currentUser.jupiterStars||0)-box.priceJupiter; debouncedSave(); /* Nota: updateUI() se llama dentro de _mostrarRecompensa al terminar la animación */ /* rareza ganada */ const wonKey=_rollRarity(box); _animCaja(box, wonKey); } function _rollRarity(box){ let total=0; for(const r of BOX_RARITIES) total+=(box.rarities[r.key]?.chance||0); if(total<=0) return BOX_RARITIES[0].key; let roll=Math.random()*total; for(const r of BOX_RARITIES){ roll-=(box.rarities[r.key]?.chance||0); if(roll<=0) return r.key; } return BOX_RARITIES[0].key; } /* ---- ANIMACIÓN PRINCIPAL ---- */ function _animCaja(box, wonKey){ const wonIdx = Math.max(0, BOX_RARITIES.findIndex(r=>r.key===wonKey)); const wonR = BOX_RARITIES[wonIdx]; /* número de clics para revelar: mín 4, aumenta con rareza */ const TOTAL = 4 + wonIdx * 2; // raro=4 ultra-leg=14 let clicks = 0; let done = false; /* ---------- construir overlay ---------- */ const ov = document.createElement('div'); ov.id = 'caja-overlay'; /* instrucción */ const hint = document.createElement('div'); hint.className='caja-hint'; hint.textContent='¡HAZ CLIC EN CUALQUIER PARTE DE LA PANTALLA!'; /* imagen flotante */ const wrap = document.createElement('div'); wrap.className='caja-img-wrap'; const img = document.createElement('img'); img.src = box.image; img.className='caja-float'; img.onerror=()=>{ img.src='https://via.placeholder.com/200?text=Caja'; }; wrap.appendChild(img); /* barra de rareza */ const barWrap = document.createElement('div'); barWrap.className='caja-bar-wrap'; const barFill = document.createElement('div'); barFill.className='caja-bar-fill'; barFill.style.width=(1/BOX_RARITIES.length*100)+'%'; barFill.style.background=BOX_RARITIES[0].bar; barWrap.appendChild(barFill); /* nombre rareza */ const rLabel = document.createElement('div'); rLabel.className='caja-rarity-name'; rLabel.style.color=BOX_RARITIES[0].color; rLabel.style.textShadow=`0 0 20px ${BOX_RARITIES[0].color}`; rLabel.textContent=BOX_RARITIES[0].label; /* contador */ const cntEl = document.createElement('div'); cntEl.className='caja-clicks'; cntEl.innerHTML=`Clics: 0 / ${TOTAL}`; ov.append(hint, wrap, barWrap, rLabel, cntEl); document.body.appendChild(ov); /* ---------- función actualizar barra ---------- */ function setRareza(idx){ const r = BOX_RARITIES[Math.min(idx, BOX_RARITIES.length-1)]; const pct = ((idx+1)/BOX_RARITIES.length)*100; barFill.style.width = pct+'%'; barFill.style.background = r.bar; rLabel.style.color = r.color; rLabel.style.textShadow = `0 0 25px ${r.color}`; rLabel.textContent = r.label; ov.style.background = `radial-gradient(ellipse at center, ${r.color}18 0%, rgba(2,4,20,0.97) 70%)`; } /* ---------- handler de clic en TODO el overlay ---------- */ ov.addEventListener('click', function onClick(){ if(done) return; clicks++; /* animación pop en la imagen */ img.classList.remove('caja-pop'); img.classList.remove('caja-float'); void img.offsetWidth; /* reflow */ img.classList.add('caja-pop'); setTimeout(()=>{ img.classList.remove('caja-pop'); if(!done) img.classList.add('caja-float'); }, 360); /* actualizar rareza mostrada — progresión lineal hacia wonIdx */ const progress = clicks / TOTAL; const showIdx = Math.min(Math.floor(progress*(wonIdx+1)), wonIdx); setRareza(showIdx); /* contador */ cntEl.innerHTML = `Clics: ${clicks} / ${TOTAL}`; /* ¿terminó? */ if(clicks >= TOTAL){ done = true; ov.removeEventListener('click', onClick); setRareza(wonIdx); hint.textContent=''; cntEl.innerHTML=`¡${wonR.label}!`; /* flash y zoom final */ img.style.transition='transform 0.5s, filter 0.5s'; img.style.transform='scale(1.3)'; img.style.filter=`drop-shadow(0 0 60px ${wonR.color}) brightness(1.6)`; setTimeout(()=>{ if(ov.parentNode) document.body.removeChild(ov); _mostrarRecompensa(box, wonKey); }, 900); } }); } /* ---- MOSTRAR RECOMPENSA ---- */ function _mostrarRecompensa(box, wonKey){ const rarity = BOX_RARITIES.find(r=>r.key===wonKey)||BOX_RARITIES[0]; const rd = (box.rarities&&box.rarities[wonKey])||{}; /* aplicar recompensas */ let rewardHTML=''; /* --- sorteo de item entre la lista de items de esta rareza --- */ const itemsList = rd.items && rd.items.length > 0 ? rd.items : (rd.itemId ? [{ itemId: rd.itemId, chance: 1 }] : []); /* compat. cajas antiguas */ if(itemsList.length > 0){ let totalItemChance = itemsList.reduce((s,i) => s + (i.chance||0), 0); let roll = Math.random() * totalItemChance; let wonEntry = itemsList[0]; for(const entry of itemsList){ roll -= (entry.chance||0); if(roll <= 0){ wonEntry = entry; break; } } const item = allItems.find(i => String(i.id) === String(wonEntry.itemId)); if(item){ const ni = _mkInventoryItem(item); // FIX: Asegurar que inventory sea un array propio if (!Array.isArray(currentUser.inventory)) currentUser.inventory = []; currentUser.inventory.push(ni); currentUser.stats.itemsCollected=(currentUser.stats.itemsCollected||0)+1; rewardHTML+=`
${item.name}
${item.rarity||''}
`; } } const coins=[]; if((rd.gold||0)>0) { currentUser.gold+=rd.gold; coins.push(` ${rd.gold} Oro`); } if((rd.diamond||0)>0) { currentUser.diamonds+=rd.diamond; coins.push(` ${rd.diamond} Diamantes`); } if((rd.dragon||0)>0) { currentUser.dragonBreath+=rd.dragon; coins.push(` ${rd.dragon} Aliento`); } if((rd.energy||0)>0) { currentUser.energy=(currentUser.energy||0)+rd.energy; coins.push(` ${rd.energy} Energía`); } if((rd.jupiter||0)>0) { currentUser.jupiterStars=(currentUser.jupiterStars||0)+rd.jupiter; coins.push(` ${rd.jupiter} Estrellas Júpiter`); } if((rd.eventCoins||0)>0) { currentUser.eventCoins=(currentUser.eventCoins||0)+rd.eventCoins; const evName=(typeof EventoSystem!=='undefined'&&EventoSystem.getData().monedaEvento?.nombre)||'Moneda Evento'; coins.push(`🪙 ${rd.eventCoins} ${evName}`); } if(coins.length>0){ rewardHTML+=`
${coins.join('')}
`; } if(!rewardHTML) rewardHTML=`
🎁

Sin recompensas configuradas

`; currentUser.stats.packsOpened=(currentUser.stats.packsOpened||0)+1; /* overlay resultado */ const ov = document.createElement('div'); ov.id='caja-overlay'; ov.style.background='rgba(2,4,20,0.96)'; const card = document.createElement('div'); card.className='caja-result-card'; card.style.borderColor=rarity.color; card.style.boxShadow=`0 0 60px ${rarity.color}55`; card.innerHTML=`
${rarity.label}
${rewardHTML} `; ov.appendChild(card); document.body.appendChild(ov); /* guardar y actualizar UI DESPUÉS de mostrar el overlay */ debouncedSave(); /* partículas de celebración */ _spawnParticulas(rarity.color); } /* ---- partículas ---- */ function _spawnParticulas(color){ for(let i=0;i<55;i++){ const p=document.createElement('div'); const size=Math.random()*14+5; const angle=Math.random()*Math.PI*2; const dist=Math.random()*260+80; p.style.cssText=` position:fixed; width:${size}px;height:${size}px;border-radius:50%; background:${color}; left:${40+Math.random()*20}vw; top:${30+Math.random()*40}vh; pointer-events:none;z-index:100001;opacity:0.95; --px:${(Math.cos(angle)*dist).toFixed(0)}px; --py:${(Math.sin(angle)*dist).toFixed(0)}px; animation:pFloat ${(Math.random()*1.2+0.7).toFixed(2)}s ease-out ${(Math.random()*0.3).toFixed(2)}s forwards;`; document.body.appendChild(p); setTimeout(()=>{ if(p.parentNode)p.parentNode.removeChild(p); },2500); } } /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ APERTURA MÚLTIPLE DE CAJAS ×10 / ×50 Agrega funcionalidad sin modificar la lógica existente. 1 animación → calcula todo en memoria → muestra resumen. ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ function abrirCajaMultiple(boxId, qty) { if (!currentUser) { showToast('Inicia sesión para abrir cajas', 'error'); return; } const box = allBoxes.find(b => String(b.id) === String(boxId)); if (!box) { showToast('Caja no encontrada', 'error'); return; } const totalGold = (box.priceGold || 0) * qty; const totalDiamond = (box.priceDiamond || 0) * qty; const totalJupiter = (box.priceJupiter || 0) * qty; if (totalGold > 0 && (currentUser.gold || 0) < totalGold) { showToast(`Necesitas ${totalGold.toLocaleString()} de oro 💰`, 'error'); return; } if (totalDiamond > 0 && (currentUser.diamonds || 0) < totalDiamond) { showToast(`Necesitas ${totalDiamond.toLocaleString()} diamantes 💎`, 'error'); return; } if (totalJupiter > 0 && (currentUser.jupiterStars || 0) < totalJupiter) { showToast(`Necesitas ${totalJupiter.toLocaleString()} Estrellas Júpiter ⭐`, 'error'); return; } if (totalGold > 0) currentUser.gold = (currentUser.gold || 0) - totalGold; if (totalDiamond > 0) currentUser.diamonds = (currentUser.diamonds || 0) - totalDiamond; if (totalJupiter > 0) currentUser.jupiterStars = (currentUser.jupiterStars || 0) - totalJupiter; debouncedSave(); _animCajaLote(box, qty); } /* Animación única para modo lote — igual a _animCaja pero sin generar recompensa al final */ function _animCajaLote(box, qty) { const available = BOX_RARITIES.filter(r => (box.rarities?.[r.key]?.chance || 0) > 0); const displayR = available.length > 0 ? available[available.length - 1] : BOX_RARITIES[0]; const wonIdx = BOX_RARITIES.findIndex(r => r.key === displayR.key); const wonR = BOX_RARITIES[wonIdx]; const TOTAL = 4 + wonIdx * 2; let clicks = 0, done = false; const ov = document.createElement('div'); ov.id = 'caja-overlay'; const hint = document.createElement('div'); hint.className = 'caja-hint'; hint.textContent = `¡Abriendo ×${qty}! — HAZ CLIC EN CUALQUIER PARTE`; const wrap = document.createElement('div'); wrap.className = 'caja-img-wrap'; const img = document.createElement('img'); img.src = box.image; img.className = 'caja-float'; img.onerror = () => { img.src = 'https://via.placeholder.com/200?text=Caja'; }; wrap.appendChild(img); const barWrap = document.createElement('div'); barWrap.className = 'caja-bar-wrap'; const barFill = document.createElement('div'); barFill.className = 'caja-bar-fill'; barFill.style.width = (1 / BOX_RARITIES.length * 100) + '%'; barFill.style.background = BOX_RARITIES[0].bar; barWrap.appendChild(barFill); const rLabel = document.createElement('div'); rLabel.className = 'caja-rarity-name'; rLabel.style.color = BOX_RARITIES[0].color; rLabel.style.textShadow = `0 0 20px ${BOX_RARITIES[0].color}`; rLabel.textContent = BOX_RARITIES[0].label; const cntEl = document.createElement('div'); cntEl.className = 'caja-clicks'; cntEl.innerHTML = `Clics: 0 / ${TOTAL}`; const badge = document.createElement('div'); badge.style.cssText = 'font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:2px;margin-top:6px;'; badge.textContent = `×${qty}`; ov.append(hint, wrap, barWrap, rLabel, cntEl, badge); document.body.appendChild(ov); function setRareza(idx) { const r = BOX_RARITIES[Math.min(idx, BOX_RARITIES.length - 1)]; const pct = ((idx + 1) / BOX_RARITIES.length) * 100; barFill.style.width = pct + '%'; barFill.style.background = r.bar; rLabel.style.color = r.color; rLabel.style.textShadow = `0 0 25px ${r.color}`; rLabel.textContent = r.label; ov.style.background = `radial-gradient(ellipse at center, ${r.color}18 0%, rgba(2,4,20,0.97) 70%)`; } ov.addEventListener('click', function onClick() { if (done) return; clicks++; img.classList.remove('caja-pop'); img.classList.remove('caja-float'); void img.offsetWidth; img.classList.add('caja-pop'); setTimeout(() => { img.classList.remove('caja-pop'); if (!done) img.classList.add('caja-float'); }, 360); const showIdx = Math.min(Math.floor((clicks / TOTAL) * (wonIdx + 1)), wonIdx); setRareza(showIdx); cntEl.innerHTML = `Clics: ${clicks} / ${TOTAL}`; if (clicks >= TOTAL) { done = true; ov.removeEventListener('click', onClick); setRareza(wonIdx); hint.textContent = ''; cntEl.innerHTML = `¡${wonR.label}!`; img.style.transition = 'transform 0.5s, filter 0.5s'; img.style.transform = 'scale(1.3)'; img.style.filter = `drop-shadow(0 0 60px ${wonR.color}) brightness(1.6)`; setTimeout(() => { if (ov.parentNode) document.body.removeChild(ov); const results = _calcRecompensasLote(box, qty); _mostrarRecompensasLote(box, results, qty); }, 900); } }); } /* Calcula qty recompensas en memoria — sin DOM, sin toasts — rápido */ function _calcRecompensasLote(box, qty) { if (!Array.isArray(currentUser.inventory)) currentUser.inventory = []; const totals = { gold: 0, diamonds: 0, dragonBreath: 0, energy: 0, jupiterStars: 0, eventCoins: 0 }; const itemMap = {}; // itemId → { item, count, rarityKey } const rarityCount = {}; // rarityKey → count for (let i = 0; i < qty; i++) { const wonKey = _rollRarity(box); const rd = (box.rarities && box.rarities[wonKey]) || {}; rarityCount[wonKey] = (rarityCount[wonKey] || 0) + 1; /* item */ const itemsList = rd.items && rd.items.length > 0 ? rd.items : (rd.itemId ? [{ itemId: rd.itemId, chance: 1 }] : []); if (itemsList.length > 0) { let totalChance = itemsList.reduce((s, e) => s + (e.chance || 0), 0); let roll = Math.random() * totalChance; let wonEntry = itemsList[0]; for (const entry of itemsList) { roll -= (entry.chance || 0); if (roll <= 0) { wonEntry = entry; break; } } const item = allItems.find(it => String(it.id) === String(wonEntry.itemId)); if (item) { currentUser.inventory.push(_mkInventoryItem(item)); currentUser.stats.itemsCollected = (currentUser.stats.itemsCollected || 0) + 1; if (!itemMap[item.id]) itemMap[item.id] = { item, count: 0, rarityKey: wonKey }; itemMap[item.id].count++; } } /* monedas */ if ((rd.gold || 0) > 0) { totals.gold += rd.gold; currentUser.gold = (currentUser.gold || 0) + rd.gold; } if ((rd.diamond || 0) > 0) { totals.diamonds += rd.diamond; currentUser.diamonds = (currentUser.diamonds || 0) + rd.diamond; } if ((rd.dragon || 0) > 0) { totals.dragonBreath += rd.dragon; currentUser.dragonBreath = (currentUser.dragonBreath || 0) + rd.dragon; } if ((rd.energy || 0) > 0) { totals.energy += rd.energy; currentUser.energy = (currentUser.energy || 0) + rd.energy; } if ((rd.jupiter || 0) > 0) { totals.jupiterStars += rd.jupiter; currentUser.jupiterStars = (currentUser.jupiterStars || 0) + rd.jupiter; } if ((rd.eventCoins || 0) > 0) { totals.eventCoins += rd.eventCoins; currentUser.eventCoins = (currentUser.eventCoins || 0) + rd.eventCoins; } } currentUser.stats.packsOpened = (currentUser.stats.packsOpened || 0) + qty; debouncedSave(); return { totals, itemMap, rarityCount }; } /* Renderiza el resumen de apertura múltiple */ function _mostrarRecompensasLote(box, results, qty) { const { totals, itemMap, rarityCount } = results; const topRarity = BOX_RARITIES.slice().reverse().find(r => rarityCount[r.key]) || BOX_RARITIES[0]; const itemEntries = Object.values(itemMap); const MAX_SHOWN = 20; const shown = itemEntries.slice(0, MAX_SHOWN); const extra = itemEntries.slice(MAX_SHOWN).reduce((s, e) => s + e.count, 0); const totalItems = itemEntries.reduce((s, e) => s + e.count, 0); const itemsHTML = shown.length > 0 ? `
${shown.map(({ item, count, rarityKey }) => { const rc = BOX_RARITIES.find(r => r.key === rarityKey); const color = rc ? rc.color : '#aaa'; return `
${item.name}
${count > 1 ? `
×${count}
` : ''}
`; }).join('')} ${extra > 0 ? `
+${extra} ítems más
` : ''}
` : ''; const coinLines = []; if (totals.gold > 0) coinLines.push(` +${totals.gold.toLocaleString()} Oro`); if (totals.diamonds > 0) coinLines.push(` +${totals.diamonds.toLocaleString()} Diamantes`); if (totals.dragonBreath > 0) coinLines.push(` +${totals.dragonBreath.toLocaleString()} Aliento`); if (totals.energy > 0) coinLines.push(` +${totals.energy.toLocaleString()} Energía`); if (totals.jupiterStars > 0) coinLines.push(` +${totals.jupiterStars.toLocaleString()} Estrellas Júpiter`); if (totals.eventCoins > 0) { const evName = (typeof EventoSystem !== 'undefined' && EventoSystem.getData().monedaEvento?.nombre) || 'Moneda Evento'; coinLines.push(`🪙 +${totals.eventCoins.toLocaleString()} ${evName}`); } const coinsHTML = coinLines.length > 0 ? `
${coinLines.join('')}
` : ''; const rarityStatsHTML = `
${BOX_RARITIES.filter(r => rarityCount[r.key] > 0).map(r => `${r.label}: ${rarityCount[r.key]}` ).join('')}
`; const ov = document.createElement('div'); ov.id = 'caja-overlay'; ov.style.background = 'rgba(2,4,20,0.96)'; const card = document.createElement('div'); card.className = 'caja-result-card'; card.style.borderColor = topRarity.color; card.style.boxShadow = `0 0 60px ${topRarity.color}55`; card.style.maxWidth = '540px'; card.innerHTML = `
¡×${qty} Abierto!
${totalItems} ítem${totalItems !== 1 ? 's' : ''} obtenido${totalItems !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
${rarityStatsHTML} ${itemsHTML} ${coinsHTML} `; ov.appendChild(card); document.body.appendChild(ov); debouncedSave(); _spawnParticulas(topRarity.color); } // ============================================ // CALCULADORA DE DAÑO + VIDA → ORO // 1 daño = 120 oro | 1 vida = 5 oro | suma total // ============================================ const DC_GOLD_PER_DMG = 120; const DC_GOLD_PER_HEALTH = 5; function calcDamageGold() { const dmg = parseFloat(document.getElementById('dc-damage')?.value) || 0; const health = parseFloat(document.getElementById('dc-health')?.value) || 0; const result = document.getElementById('dc-result'); if (!result) return; if (dmg <= 0 && health <= 0) { result.style.display = 'none'; return; } const goldDmg = Math.round(dmg * DC_GOLD_PER_DMG); const goldHealth = Math.round(health * DC_GOLD_PER_HEALTH); const total = goldDmg + goldHealth; document.getElementById('dc-part-damage').textContent = goldDmg.toLocaleString('es-CO'); document.getElementById('dc-part-health').textContent = goldHealth.toLocaleString('es-CO'); document.getElementById('dc-part-total').textContent = total.toLocaleString('es-CO'); document.getElementById('dc-gold-value').textContent = '🪙 ' + total.toLocaleString('es-CO') + ' Oro'; const parts = []; if (dmg > 0) parts.push(`${dmg} daño × ${DC_GOLD_PER_DMG} = ${goldDmg.toLocaleString('es-CO')}`); if (health > 0) parts.push(`${health} vida × ${DC_GOLD_PER_HEALTH} = ${goldHealth.toLocaleString('es-CO')}`); document.getElementById('dc-formula').textContent = parts.join(' + ') + ' = ' + total.toLocaleString('es-CO') + ' oro total'; result.style.display = 'block'; } function copyDcGold() { const dmg = parseFloat(document.getElementById('dc-damage')?.value) || 0; const health = parseFloat(document.getElementById('dc-health')?.value) || 0; if (dmg <= 0 && health <= 0) { showToast('Ingresa daño o vida primero', 'error'); return; } const total = Math.round(dmg * DC_GOLD_PER_DMG) + Math.round(health * DC_GOLD_PER_HEALTH); const priceInput = document.getElementById('item-price-gold'); if (priceInput) { priceInput.value = total; showToast(`✅ ${total.toLocaleString('es-CO')} oro copiado al formulario de Ítem`, 'success'); // Switch admin tab manually (event needed, fake it) document.querySelectorAll('.admin-content').forEach(c => c.classList.add('hidden')); document.getElementById('admin-create-item').classList.remove('hidden'); document.querySelectorAll('.admin-tab-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active')); document.querySelectorAll('.admin-tab-btn')[0].classList.add('active'); } else { showToast('Ve a "Crear Ítem" para usar este precio', 'info'); } } function initDamageCalcTable() { const table = document.getElementById('dc-table'); if (!table) return; // Pares [daño, vida] de referencia const refs = [ [10, 50], [20, 100], [40, 200], [80, 400], [100, 500], [200, 1000], [500, 2000], [1000, 5000] ]; table.innerHTML = refs.map(([dmg, hp]) => { const total = dmg * DC_GOLD_PER_DMG + hp * DC_GOLD_PER_HEALTH; return `
⚔️${dmg} ❤️${hp} 🪙 ${total.toLocaleString('es-CO')}
`; }).join(''); } // placeholder const _origApplyReward = null; /* ============================================================ FUNCIONES SELECTOR DE IMAGEN - ENEMIGOS / JEFES / MUNDOS ============================================================ */ // ── SOBRE ── function switchPackImgTab(tab) { ['url','file','gallery'].forEach(t => { const btn = document.getElementById('pack-img-tab-'+t); const panel = document.getElementById('pack-img-panel-'+t); if (btn) { btn.style.background = t===tab ? 'var(--gold)' : 'transparent'; btn.style.color = t===tab ? '#0a0e27' : 'var(--gold)'; } if (panel) panel.style.display = t===tab ? 'block' : 'none'; }); if (tab === 'gallery') populatePackGallery(''); } function updatePackImgPreview(url) { const wrap = document.getElementById('pack-img-preview-wrap'); const img = document.getElementById('pack-img-preview'); if (!url || !url.trim()) { wrap.style.display='none'; return; } img.src = url.trim(); wrap.style.display='block'; img.onerror = () => wrap.style.display='none'; } function handlePackImageFile(input) { const file = input.files[0]; if (!file) return; const r = new FileReader(); r.onload = e => { compressImageBase64(e.target.result, 512, 0.72).then(compressed => { document.getElementById('pack-image').value = compressed; document.getElementById('pack-img-preview').src = compressed; document.getElementById('pack-img-preview-wrap').style.display='block'; }); }; r.readAsDataURL(file); } function populatePackGallery(filter) { const grid = document.getElementById('pack-gallery-grid'); if (!grid) return; grid.innerHTML = ''; const q = (filter||'').toLowerCase(); const seen = new Set(); const sources = [...(allPacks||[]), ...(allBoxes||[]), ...(allItems||[])]; const matches = sources.filter(x => { if (!x.image || x.image.includes('placeholder')) return false; if (seen.has(x.image)) return false; seen.add(x.image); if (q && !x.name.toLowerCase().includes(q)) return false; return true; }); if (!matches.length) { grid.innerHTML='

No hay imágenes en la galería aún.

'; return; } matches.forEach(x => { const wrap=document.createElement('div'); wrap.style.cssText='cursor:pointer;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;border:2px solid transparent;transition:0.15s;'; wrap.onmouseover=()=>wrap.style.borderColor='var(--gold)'; wrap.onmouseout=()=>wrap.style.borderColor='transparent'; wrap.onclick=()=>{ document.getElementById('pack-image').value=x.image; updatePackImgPreview(x.image); switchPackImgTab('url'); }; const img=document.createElement('img'); img.src=x.image; img.alt=x.name; img.style.cssText='width:100%;height:60px;object-fit:contain;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.3);display:block;'; img.onerror=()=>wrap.style.display='none'; const label=document.createElement('div'); label.textContent=x.name; label.style.cssText='font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--text-secondary);text-align:center;padding:2px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;'; wrap.appendChild(img); wrap.appendChild(label); grid.appendChild(wrap); }); } function filterPackGallery(val) { populatePackGallery(val); } // ── CAJA ── function switchBoxImgTab(tab) { ['url','file','gallery'].forEach(t => { const btn = document.getElementById('box-img-tab-'+t); const panel = document.getElementById('box-img-panel-'+t); if (btn) { btn.style.background = t===tab ? 'var(--diamond)' : 'transparent'; btn.style.color = t===tab ? '#0a0e27' : 'var(--diamond)'; } if (panel) panel.style.display = t===tab ? 'block' : 'none'; }); if (tab === 'gallery') populateBoxGallery(''); } function updateBoxImgPreview(url) { const wrap = document.getElementById('box-img-preview-wrap'); const img = document.getElementById('box-img-preview'); if (!url || !url.trim()) { wrap.style.display='none'; return; } img.src = url.trim(); wrap.style.display='block'; img.onerror = () => wrap.style.display='none'; } /* ============================================================ COMPRESOR DE IMÁGENES — máx 512px, JPEG calidad 72% Mantiene la imagen visualmente buena pero reduce el peso entre 3x y 10x frente al original. ============================================================ */ function compressImageBase64(dataUrl, maxDim, quality) { maxDim = maxDim || 512; quality = quality || 0.72; return new Promise(function(resolve) { var img = new Image(); img.onload = function() { var w = img.naturalWidth; var h = img.naturalHeight; // Calcular nueva dimensión manteniendo proporción if (w > maxDim || h > maxDim) { if (w >= h) { h = Math.round(h * maxDim / w); w = maxDim; } else { w = Math.round(w * maxDim / h); h = maxDim; } } var canvas = document.createElement('canvas'); canvas.width = w; canvas.height = h; var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, w, h); // Intentar JPEG; si la fuente era PNG con transparencia queda WebP/PNG var output = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', quality); // Si la imagen original es más pequeña que la comprimida, la dejamos igual if (output.length > dataUrl.length) output = dataUrl; resolve(output); }; img.onerror = function() { resolve(dataUrl); }; // fallback sin cambios img.src = dataUrl; }); } function handleBoxImageFile(input) { const file = input.files[0]; if (!file) return; const r = new FileReader(); r.onload = e => { compressImageBase64(e.target.result, 512, 0.72).then(compressed => { document.getElementById('box-image').value = compressed; document.getElementById('box-img-preview').src = compressed; document.getElementById('box-img-preview-wrap').style.display='block'; }); }; r.readAsDataURL(file); } function populateBoxGallery(filter) { const grid = document.getElementById('box-gallery-grid'); if (!grid) return; grid.innerHTML = ''; const q = (filter||'').toLowerCase(); const seen = new Set(); const sources = [...(allBoxes||[]), ...(allPacks||[]), ...(allItems||[])]; const matches = sources.filter(x => { if (!x.image || x.image.includes('placeholder')) return false; if (seen.has(x.image)) return false; seen.add(x.image); if (q && !x.name.toLowerCase().includes(q)) return false; return true; }); if (!matches.length) { grid.innerHTML='

No hay imágenes en la galería aún.

'; return; } matches.forEach(x => { const wrap=document.createElement('div'); wrap.style.cssText='cursor:pointer;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;border:2px solid transparent;transition:0.15s;'; wrap.onmouseover=()=>wrap.style.borderColor='var(--diamond)'; wrap.onmouseout=()=>wrap.style.borderColor='transparent'; wrap.onclick=()=>{ document.getElementById('box-image').value=x.image; updateBoxImgPreview(x.image); switchBoxImgTab('url'); }; const img=document.createElement('img'); img.src=x.image; img.alt=x.name; img.style.cssText='width:100%;height:60px;object-fit:contain;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.3);display:block;'; img.onerror=()=>wrap.style.display='none'; const label=document.createElement('div'); label.textContent=x.name; label.style.cssText='font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--text-secondary);text-align:center;padding:2px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;'; wrap.appendChild(img); wrap.appendChild(label); grid.appendChild(wrap); }); } function filterBoxGallery(val) { populateBoxGallery(val); } // ── ENEMIGO ── function switchEnemyImgTab(tab) { ['url','file','gallery'].forEach(t => { document.getElementById('enemy-img-tab-' + t).style.background = t === tab ? 'var(--accent)' : 'transparent'; document.getElementById('enemy-img-tab-' + t).style.color = t === tab ? '#fff' : 'var(--accent)'; document.getElementById('enemy-img-panel-' + t).style.display = t === tab ? 'block' : 'none'; }); if (tab === 'gallery') populateEnemyGallery(''); } function updateEnemyImgPreview(url) { const wrap = document.getElementById('enemy-img-preview-wrap'); const img = document.getElementById('enemy-img-preview'); if (!url || !url.trim()) { wrap.style.display='none'; return; } img.src = url.trim(); wrap.style.display='block'; img.onerror = () => wrap.style.display='none'; } function handleEnemyImageFile(input) { const file = input.files[0]; if (!file) return; const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = e => { compressImageBase64(e.target.result, 512, 0.72).then(compressed => { document.getElementById('enemy-image').value = compressed; const wrap = document.getElementById('enemy-img-preview-wrap'); document.getElementById('enemy-img-preview').src = compressed; wrap.style.display='block'; }); }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); } function populateEnemyGallery(filter) { const grid = document.getElementById('enemy-gallery-grid'); if (!grid) return; grid.innerHTML = ''; const q = (filter||'').toLowerCase(); const seen = new Set(); const sources = [...(allEnemies||[]), ...(allBosses||[]), ...(allItems||[])]; const matches = sources.filter(x => { if (!x.image || x.image.includes('placeholder')) return false; if (seen.has(x.image)) return false; seen.add(x.image); if (q && !x.name.toLowerCase().includes(q)) return false; return true; }); if (!matches.length) { grid.innerHTML='

No hay imágenes en la galería aún.

'; return; } matches.forEach(x => { const wrap = document.createElement('div'); wrap.style.cssText='cursor:pointer;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;border:2px solid transparent;transition:0.15s;'; wrap.onmouseover=()=>wrap.style.borderColor='var(--accent)'; wrap.onmouseout=()=>wrap.style.borderColor='transparent'; wrap.onclick=()=>{ document.getElementById('enemy-image').value=x.image; updateEnemyImgPreview(x.image); switchEnemyImgTab('url'); }; const img=document.createElement('img'); img.src=x.image; img.alt=x.name; img.style.cssText='width:100%;height:60px;object-fit:contain;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.3);display:block;'; img.onerror=()=>wrap.style.display='none'; const label=document.createElement('div'); label.textContent=x.name; label.style.cssText='font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--text-secondary);text-align:center;padding:2px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;'; wrap.appendChild(img); wrap.appendChild(label); grid.appendChild(wrap); }); } function filterEnemyGallery(val) { populateEnemyGallery(val); } // ── JEFE ── function switchBossImgTab(tab) { ['url','file','gallery'].forEach(t => { document.getElementById('boss-img-tab-' + t).style.background = t === tab ? 'var(--dragon-breath)' : 'transparent'; document.getElementById('boss-img-tab-' + t).style.color = t === tab ? 'block' : 'none'; }); if (tab === 'gallery') populateBossGallery(''); } function updateBossImgPreview(url) { const wrap = document.getElementById('boss-img-preview-wrap'); const img = document.getElementById('boss-img-preview'); if (!url || !url.trim()) { wrap.style.display='none'; return; } img.src = url.trim(); wrap.style.display='block'; img.onerror = () => wrap.style.display='none'; } function handleBossImageFile(input) { const file = input.files[0]; if (!file) return; const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = e => { compressImageBase64(e.target.result, 512, 0.72).then(compressed => { document.getElementById('boss-image').value = compressed; document.getElementById('boss-img-preview').src = compressed; document.getElementById('boss-img-preview-wrap').style.display='block'; }); }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); } function populateBossGallery(filter) { const grid = document.getElementById('boss-gallery-grid'); if (!grid) return; grid.innerHTML = ''; const q = (filter||'').toLowerCase(); const seen = new Set(); const sources = [...(allBosses||[]), ...(allEnemies||[]), ...(allItems||[])]; const matches = sources.filter(x => { if (!x.image || x.image.includes('placeholder')) return false; if (seen.has(x.image)) return false; seen.add(x.image); if (q && !x.name.toLowerCase().includes(q)) return false; return true; }); if (!matches.length) { grid.innerHTML='

No hay imágenes en la galería aún.

'; return; } matches.forEach(x => { const wrap=document.createElement('div'); wrap.style.cssText='cursor:pointer;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;border:2px solid transparent;transition:0.15s;'; wrap.onmouseover=()=>wrap.style.borderColor='var(--dragon-breath)'; wrap.onmouseout=()=>wrap.style.borderColor='transparent'; wrap.onclick=()=>{ document.getElementById('boss-image').value=x.image; updateBossImgPreview(x.image); switchBossImgTab('url'); }; const img=document.createElement('img'); img.src=x.image; img.alt=x.name; img.style.cssText='width:100%;height:60px;object-fit:contain;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.3);display:block;'; img.onerror=()=>wrap.style.display='none'; const label=document.createElement('div'); label.textContent=x.name; label.style.cssText='font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--text-secondary);text-align:center;padding:2px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;'; wrap.appendChild(img); wrap.appendChild(label); grid.appendChild(wrap); }); } function filterBossGallery(val) { populateBossGallery(val); } // ── MUNDOS (genérico para portada y fondo) ── function switchWorldImgTab(prefix, tab, color) { ['url','file','gallery'].forEach(t => { const btn = document.getElementById(prefix+'-tab-'+t); const panel = document.getElementById(prefix+'-panel-'+t); if (btn) { btn.style.background = t===tab ? color : 'transparent'; btn.style.color = t===tab ? '#fff' : color; } if (panel) panel.style.display = t===tab ? 'block' : 'none'; }); if (tab === 'gallery') { const fieldId = prefix === 'worldimg' ? 'world-image' : 'world-background'; populateWorldGallery(prefix, '', fieldId, color); } } function updateWorldImgPreview(prefix, url, color) { const wrap = document.getElementById(prefix+'-preview-wrap'); const img = document.getElementById(prefix+'-preview'); if (!url || !url.trim()) { wrap.style.display='none'; return; } img.src = url.trim(); wrap.style.display='block'; img.onerror = () => wrap.style.display='none'; } function handleWorldImageFile(input, prefix, fieldId, color) { const file = input.files[0]; if (!file) return; const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = e => { compressImageBase64(e.target.result, 512, 0.72).then(compressed => { document.getElementById(fieldId).value = compressed; document.getElementById(prefix+'-preview').src = compressed; document.getElementById(prefix+'-preview-wrap').style.display='block'; }); }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); } function populateWorldGallery(prefix, filter, fieldId, color) { const grid = document.getElementById(prefix+'-gallery-grid'); if (!grid) return; grid.innerHTML = ''; const q = (filter||'').toLowerCase(); const seen = new Set(); const sources = [...(allItems||[]), ...(allEnemies||[]), ...(allBosses||[])]; const matches = sources.filter(x => { if (!x.image || x.image.includes('placeholder')) return false; if (seen.has(x.image)) return false; seen.add(x.image); if (q && !x.name.toLowerCase().includes(q)) return false; return true; }); if (!matches.length) { grid.innerHTML='

No hay imágenes en la galería aún.

'; return; } matches.forEach(x => { const wrap=document.createElement('div'); wrap.style.cssText='cursor:pointer;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;border:2px solid transparent;transition:0.15s;'; wrap.onmouseover=()=>wrap.style.borderColor=color; wrap.onmouseout=()=>wrap.style.borderColor='transparent'; wrap.onclick=()=>{ document.getElementById(fieldId).value=x.image; updateWorldImgPreview(prefix,x.image,color); switchWorldImgTab(prefix,'url',color); }; const img=document.createElement('img'); img.src=x.image; img.alt=x.name; img.style.cssText='width:100%;height:60px;object-fit:contain;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.3);display:block;'; img.onerror=()=>wrap.style.display='none'; const label=document.createElement('div'); label.textContent=x.name; label.style.cssText='font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--text-secondary);text-align:center;padding:2px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;'; wrap.appendChild(img); wrap.appendChild(label); grid.appendChild(wrap); }); } function filterWorldGallery(prefix, val, fieldId, color) { populateWorldGallery(prefix, val, fieldId, color); } /* ============================================================ FUNCIONES SELECTOR DE IMAGEN - CREAR ÍTEM ============================================================ */ // Cambia entre los tabs URL / Archivo / Galería function switchImgTab(tab) { const tabs = ['url', 'file', 'gallery']; tabs.forEach(t => { const btn = document.getElementById('img-tab-' + t); const panel = document.getElementById('img-panel-' + t); if (!btn || !panel) return; if (t === tab) { btn.style.background = 'var(--secondary)'; btn.style.color = '#fff'; panel.style.display = 'block'; } else { btn.style.background = 'transparent'; btn.style.color = 'var(--secondary)'; panel.style.display = 'none'; } }); if (tab === 'gallery') populateItemGallery(''); } // Actualiza el preview cuando se escribe una URL function updateImgPreview(url) { const wrap = document.getElementById('item-img-preview-wrap'); const img = document.getElementById('item-img-preview'); if (!wrap || !img) return; if (url && url.trim()) { img.src = url.trim(); wrap.style.display = 'block'; img.onerror = () => { wrap.style.display = 'none'; }; img.onload = () => { wrap.style.display = 'block'; }; } else { wrap.style.display = 'none'; } } // Maneja la carga de un archivo local y lo convierte a base64 (comprimido) function handleItemImageFile(input) { const file = input.files[0]; if (!file) return; const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = function(e) { compressImageBase64(e.target.result, 512, 0.72).then(compressed => { document.getElementById('item-image').value = compressed; const wrap = document.getElementById('item-img-preview-wrap'); const img = document.getElementById('item-img-preview'); if (wrap && img) { img.src = compressed; wrap.style.display = 'block'; } }); }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); } // Rellena la galería con las imágenes de los ítems existentes function populateItemGallery(filter) { const grid = document.getElementById('item-gallery-grid'); const emptyMsg = document.getElementById('gallery-empty-msg'); if (!grid) return; // Limpiar grid (sin el mensaje vacío) grid.innerHTML = ''; const query = (filter || '').toLowerCase(); const seen = new Set(); const matches = (typeof allItems !== 'undefined' ? allItems : []).filter(item => { if (!item.image || item.image.includes('placeholder')) return false; if (seen.has(item.image)) return false; seen.add(item.image); if (query && !item.name.toLowerCase().includes(query)) return false; return true; }); if (matches.length === 0) { const p = document.createElement('p'); p.style.cssText = 'color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:0.82rem;padding:8px;grid-column:1/-1;'; p.textContent = query ? 'Sin resultados para "' + filter + '"' : 'No hay ítems con imagen en la galería aún.'; grid.appendChild(p); return; } matches.forEach(item => { const wrap = document.createElement('div'); wrap.title = item.name; wrap.style.cssText = 'cursor:pointer;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;border:2px solid transparent;transition:0.15s;'; wrap.onmouseover = () => { wrap.style.borderColor = 'var(--secondary)'; }; wrap.onmouseout = () => { wrap.style.borderColor = 'transparent'; }; wrap.onclick = () => selectGalleryImage(item.image, item.name); const img = document.createElement('img'); img.src = item.image; img.alt = item.name; img.style.cssText = 'width:100%;height:64px;object-fit:contain;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.3);display:block;'; img.onerror = () => { wrap.style.display = 'none'; }; const label = document.createElement('div'); label.textContent = item.name; label.style.cssText = 'font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-secondary);text-align:center;padding:2px 2px 3px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;'; wrap.appendChild(img); wrap.appendChild(label); grid.appendChild(wrap); }); } // Filtra la galería en tiempo real function filterItemGallery(value) { populateItemGallery(value); } // Selecciona una imagen de la galería y la pone en el campo URL function selectGalleryImage(src, name) { document.getElementById('item-image').value = src; // Actualizar preview const wrap = document.getElementById('item-img-preview-wrap'); const img = document.getElementById('item-img-preview'); if (wrap && img) { img.src = src; wrap.style.display = 'block'; } // Volver al tab URL para que se vea reflejado switchImgTab('url'); } /* ============================================================ SISTEMA DE RECARGAS ============================================================ */ // ---- ADMIN: Sub-tabs Recargas ---- // PERF: Cache de botones de recargas y tracking de sub-tab cargado let _recargasBtns = null; const _recargasTabLoaded = new Set(); function switchRecargasTab(tab) { ['bancos','billeteras','paquetes','solicitudes'].forEach(t => { const el = document.getElementById('admin-recargas-' + t); if (el) el.style.display = (t === tab) ? 'block' : 'none'; }); // PERF: cachear botones recargas (evitar querySelectorAll repetitivo) if (!_recargasBtns || !_recargasBtns[0]?.isConnected) { _recargasBtns = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.admin-recargas-tab-btn')); } _recargasBtns.forEach(btn => { btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.textContent.toLowerCase().includes(tab)); }); // PERF: Lazy — solo renderizar si no se ha renderizado aún (solicitudes siempre refresh) const alreadyLoaded = _recargasTabLoaded.has(tab); if (!alreadyLoaded || tab === 'solicitudes') { if (tab === 'billeteras') { renderBancosEnSelectBilletera(); renderAdminBilleteras(); } else if (tab === 'bancos') renderAdminBancos(); else if (tab === 'paquetes') renderAdminPaquetes(); else if (tab === 'solicitudes') renderAdminSolicitudes(); _recargasTabLoaded.add(tab); } } // ---- Preview imágenes ---- function previewBancoImg(url) { const wrap = document.getElementById('banco-img-preview'); const img = document.getElementById('banco-img-prev-el'); if (url && url.trim()) { img.src = url.trim(); wrap.style.display = 'block'; img.onerror = () => wrap.style.display = 'none'; } else wrap.style.display = 'none'; } function previewBilleteraImg(url) { const wrap = document.getElementById('billetera-img-preview'); const img = document.getElementById('billetera-img-prev-el'); if (url && url.trim()) { img.src = url.trim(); wrap.style.display = 'block'; img.onerror = () => wrap.style.display = 'none'; } else wrap.style.display = 'none'; } // ---- Crear Banco ---- function crearBanco() { const nombre = document.getElementById('banco-nombre').value.trim(); const imagen = document.getElementById('banco-imagen').value.trim(); if (!nombre) { showToast('Escribe el nombre del banco', 'error'); return; } const banco = { id: Date.now(), nombre, imagen }; allBanks.push(banco); debouncedSave(); document.getElementById('banco-nombre').value = ''; document.getElementById('banco-imagen').value = ''; document.getElementById('banco-img-preview').style.display = 'none'; showToast('Banco "' + nombre + '" creado ✅', 'success'); renderAdminBancos(); } function renderAdminBancos() { const el = RenderManager.getEl('admin-bancos-lista'); if (!el) return; if (!allBanks.length) { el.innerHTML = '

No hay bancos creados.

'; return; } el.innerHTML = allBanks.map(b => `
${b.imagen ? `` : '
🏦
'}
${b.nombre}
ID: ${b.id}
`).join(''); } function eliminarBanco(id) { if (!confirm('¿Eliminar este banco?')) return; allBanks = allBanks.filter(b => b.id !== id); allWallets = allWallets.filter(w => w.bancoId !== id); debouncedSave(); renderAdminBancos(); renderAdminBilleteras(); _recargasTabLoaded.delete('billeteras'); // PERF: datos de billeteras cambiaron showToast('Banco eliminado', 'info'); } // ---- Crear Billetera ---- function renderBancosEnSelectBilletera() { const sel = document.getElementById('billetera-banco'); if (!sel) return; sel.innerHTML = '' + allBanks.map(b => ``).join(''); } function crearBilletera() { const nombre = document.getElementById('billetera-nombre').value.trim(); const imagen = document.getElementById('billetera-imagen').value.trim(); const bancoId = parseInt(document.getElementById('billetera-banco').value); const codigo = document.getElementById('billetera-codigo').value.trim(); const saldo = document.getElementById('billetera-saldo').value.trim(); if (!nombre) { showToast('Escribe el nombre de la billetera', 'error'); return; } if (!bancoId) { showToast('Selecciona el banco', 'error'); return; } if (!codigo) { showToast('Escribe el código de la billetera', 'error'); return; } const banco = allBanks.find(b => b.id === bancoId); const billetera = { id: Date.now(), nombre, imagen, bancoId, bancoNombre: banco ? banco.nombre : '', codigo, saldo }; allWallets.push(billetera); debouncedSave(); document.getElementById('billetera-nombre').value = ''; document.getElementById('billetera-imagen').value = ''; document.getElementById('billetera-codigo').value = ''; document.getElementById('billetera-saldo').value = ''; document.getElementById('billetera-img-preview').style.display = 'none'; showToast('Billetera "' + nombre + '" creada ✅', 'success'); renderAdminBilleteras(); } function renderAdminBilleteras() { const el = RenderManager.getEl('admin-billeteras-lista'); if (!el) return; if (!allWallets.length) { el.innerHTML = '

No hay billeteras creadas.

'; return; } el.innerHTML = allWallets.map(w => `
${w.imagen ? `` : '
👛
'}
${w.nombre}
🏦 ${w.bancoNombre}  |  🔑 ${w.codigo}
${w.saldo ? `
Saldo: ${w.saldo}
` : ''}
`).join(''); } function eliminarBilletera(id) { if (!confirm('¿Eliminar esta billetera?')) return; allWallets = allWallets.filter(w => w.id !== id); debouncedSave(); renderAdminBilleteras(); showToast('Billetera eliminada', 'info'); } // ---- Crear Paquete de Recarga ---- function actualizarCamposPaquete() { const tipo = document.getElementById('paquete-tipo-reward').value; const cantWrap = document.getElementById('paquete-cantidad-wrap'); const itemWrap = document.getElementById('paquete-item-wrap'); if (tipo === 'item' || tipo === 'box') { cantWrap.style.display = 'none'; itemWrap.style.display = 'block'; } else if (tipo === 'battlepass') { cantWrap.style.display = 'none'; itemWrap.style.display = 'none'; } else { cantWrap.style.display = 'block'; itemWrap.style.display = 'none'; } } function crearPaqueteRecarga() { const nombre = document.getElementById('paquete-nombre').value.trim(); const tipo = document.getElementById('paquete-tipo-reward').value; const cantidad = parseInt(document.getElementById('paquete-cantidad').value) || 0; const itemId = document.getElementById('paquete-item-id').value.trim(); const precioReal = document.getElementById('paquete-precio-real').value.trim(); const imagen = document.getElementById('paquete-imagen').value.trim(); if (!nombre) { showToast('Escribe el nombre del paquete', 'error'); return; } if (!precioReal) { showToast('Escribe el precio real del paquete', 'error'); return; } if ((tipo !== 'item' && tipo !== 'box' && tipo !== 'battlepass') && cantidad <= 0) { showToast('Escribe la cantidad a dar', 'error'); return; } const pkg = { id: Date.now(), nombre, tipo, cantidad, itemId, precioReal, imagen }; allRechargePackages.push(pkg); debouncedSave(); document.getElementById('paquete-nombre').value = ''; document.getElementById('paquete-precio-real').value = ''; document.getElementById('paquete-imagen').value = ''; document.getElementById('paquete-cantidad').value = ''; document.getElementById('paquete-item-id').value = ''; showToast('Paquete "' + nombre + '" creado ✅', 'success'); renderAdminPaquetes(); } function renderAdminPaquetes() { const el = RenderManager.getEl('admin-paquetes-lista'); if (!el) return; if (!allRechargePackages.length) { el.innerHTML = '

No hay paquetes creados.

'; return; } const iconoTipo = { gold:'💰', diamond:'💎', dragonbreath:'🔥', jupiter:'⭐', item:'🗡️', box:'🎁', battlepass:'👑' }; el.innerHTML = allRechargePackages.map(p => `
${p.imagen ? `` : `
${iconoTipo[p.tipo]||'📦'}
`}
${p.nombre}
${iconoTipo[p.tipo]||'📦'} ${p.tipo === 'battlepass' ? 'Pase de Batalla' : p.tipo === 'item' || p.tipo === 'box' ? 'ID: ' + (p.itemId||'?') : p.cantidad.toLocaleString()}
"${p.precioReal}"
`).join(''); } function eliminarPaqueteRecarga(id) { if (!confirm('¿Eliminar este paquete?')) return; allRechargePackages = allRechargePackages.filter(p => p.id !== id); debouncedSave(); renderAdminPaquetes(); showToast('Paquete eliminado', 'info'); } // ---- Sección Recargas (Jugador) ---- function loadRecargasSection() { const container = document.getElementById('recargas-paquetes-container'); if (!allRechargePackages.length) { container.innerHTML = '

No hay paquetes de recarga disponibles por el momento.

'; return; } const iconoTipo = { gold:'💰 Oro', diamond:'💎 Diamantes', dragonbreath:'🔥 Aliento de Dragón', jupiter:'⭐ Estrellas Júpiter', item:'🗡️ Artículo', box:'🎁 Caja', battlepass:'👑 Pase de Batalla' }; container.innerHTML = allRechargePackages.map(p => `
${p.imagen ? `` : ''}
${p.nombre}
${iconoTipo[p.tipo]||'📦'} ${p.tipo === 'battlepass' ? 'Activar Pase' : p.tipo === 'item' || p.tipo === 'box' ? '' : `${p.cantidad ? p.cantidad.toLocaleString() : ''}`}
"${p.precioReal}"
`).join(''); } function abrirModalRecarga(packageId) { _currentRecargaPackageId = packageId; const pkg = allRechargePackages.find(p => p.id === packageId); if (!pkg) return; // Info del paquete en el modal document.getElementById('modal-recarga-desc').textContent = 'Selecciona tu banco e ingresa el código de tu billetera para confirmar el pago.'; document.getElementById('modal-recarga-nombre-pkg').textContent = pkg.nombre; document.getElementById('modal-recarga-precio-pkg').textContent = pkg.precioReal; // Llenar selector de bancos const sel = document.getElementById('modal-banco-select'); sel.innerHTML = '' + allBanks.map(b => ``).join(''); sel.onchange = null; // Limpiar campos document.getElementById('modal-codigo-billetera').value = ''; document.getElementById('modal-recarga').classList.add('active'); } function cerrarModalRecarga() { document.getElementById('modal-recarga').classList.remove('active'); document.getElementById('modal-recarga-form').style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('modal-recarga-resultado').style.display = 'none'; _currentRecargaPackageId = null; } function mostrarResultadoRecarga(exito, titulo, mensaje) { document.getElementById('modal-recarga-form').style.display = 'none'; const resEl = document.getElementById('modal-recarga-resultado'); resEl.style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('resultado-icono').textContent = exito ? '✅' : '❌'; const tituloEl = document.getElementById('resultado-titulo'); tituloEl.textContent = titulo; tituloEl.style.color = exito ? 'var(--success)' : 'var(--danger)'; document.getElementById('resultado-msg').textContent = mensaje; // Re-trigger animation const icono = document.getElementById('resultado-icono'); icono.style.animation = 'none'; icono.offsetHeight; // reflow icono.style.animation = 'resultPop 0.6s cubic-bezier(.175,.885,.32,1.275) forwards'; } function enviarSolicitudRecarga() { const bancoId = parseInt(document.getElementById('modal-banco-select').value); const codigoBilletera = document.getElementById('modal-codigo-billetera').value.trim(); if (!bancoId) { mostrarResultadoRecarga(false, 'No hay presupuesto', 'Debes seleccionar un banco para continuar.'); return; } if (!codigoBilletera) { mostrarResultadoRecarga(false, 'No hay presupuesto', 'Debes ingresar el código de tu billetera para continuar.'); return; } const pkg = allRechargePackages.find(p => p.id === _currentRecargaPackageId); const banco = allBanks.find(b => b.id === bancoId); if (!pkg) return; // ── Descontar oro del saldo de la billetera del banco ── // El precio real es solo informativo (COP/USD), no hay moneda interna de costo. // Entregar recompensa inmediatamente. let rewardMsg = ''; if (pkg.tipo === 'gold') { currentUser.gold = (currentUser.gold || 0) + (pkg.cantidad || 0); rewardMsg = `+${pkg.cantidad.toLocaleString()} 💰 Oro`; } else if (pkg.tipo === 'diamond') { currentUser.diamonds = (currentUser.diamonds || 0) + (pkg.cantidad || 0); rewardMsg = `+${pkg.cantidad.toLocaleString()} 💎 Diamantes`; } else if (pkg.tipo === 'dragonbreath') { currentUser.dragonBreath = (currentUser.dragonBreath || 0) + (pkg.cantidad || 0); rewardMsg = `+${pkg.cantidad.toLocaleString()} 🔥 Aliento de Dragón`; } else if (pkg.tipo === 'jupiter') { currentUser.jupiterStars = (currentUser.jupiterStars || 0) + (pkg.cantidad || 0); rewardMsg = `+${pkg.cantidad.toLocaleString()} ⭐ Estrellas Júpiter`; } else if (pkg.tipo === 'battlepass') { if (currentUser.battlePass && currentUser.battlePass.hasPremium) { mostrarResultadoRecarga(false, '¡Ya tienes el Pase!', 'Ya cuentas con el Pase de Batalla activo. No es necesario comprarlo de nuevo.'); return; } if (!currentUser.battlePass) currentUser.battlePass = { currentLevel: 1, currentXP: 0, hasPremium: false, claimedRewards: { free: [], premium: [] } }; currentUser.battlePass.hasPremium = true; rewardMsg = '👑 Pase de Batalla activado'; } else if (pkg.tipo === 'item') { const itemObj = allItems.find(i => String(i.id) === String(pkg.itemId)); if (itemObj) { InventorySystem.addItem(currentUser, _mkInventoryItem(itemObj)); rewardMsg = `🗡️ ${itemObj.name} añadido al inventario`; } else { rewardMsg = '🎁 Recompensa entregada'; } } else if (pkg.tipo === 'box') { // Abrir la caja y dar items directamente al inventario const boxObj = allBoxes.find(b => String(b.id) === String(pkg.itemId)); if (boxObj) { if (!currentUser.inventory) currentUser.inventory = []; const wonKey = _rollRarity(boxObj); const rd = (boxObj.rarities && boxObj.rarities[wonKey]) || {}; const itemsList = rd.items && rd.items.length > 0 ? rd.items : (rd.itemId ? [{ itemId: rd.itemId, chance: 1 }] : []); let itemGiven = null; if (itemsList.length > 0) { let totalChance = itemsList.reduce((s, i) => s + (i.chance || 0), 0); let roll = Math.random() * totalChance; let wonEntry = itemsList[0]; for (const entry of itemsList) { roll -= (entry.chance || 0); if (roll <= 0) { wonEntry = entry; break; } } itemGiven = allItems.find(i => String(i.id) === String(wonEntry.itemId)); if (itemGiven) currentUser.inventory.push(_mkInventoryItem(itemGiven)); } if ((rd.gold || 0) > 0) currentUser.gold = (currentUser.gold || 0) + rd.gold; if ((rd.diamond || 0) > 0) currentUser.diamonds = (currentUser.diamonds || 0) + rd.diamond; if ((rd.dragon || 0) > 0) currentUser.dragonBreath = (currentUser.dragonBreath || 0) + rd.dragon; if ((rd.jupiter || 0) > 0) currentUser.jupiterStars = (currentUser.jupiterStars || 0) + rd.jupiter; rewardMsg = itemGiven ? `🎁 ¡Abriste la caja!
